"It would be very useful to be able to track your enemy's armies in such a fashion."
"It is more than that; it is a reminder that enemies themselves can change into friends with a shift of the wind."
"Seek the ever-changing mysteries of water, and find yourself."

text:

Once per battle, one of your Phoenix Clan Shugenja may perform the Equip Battle action even if bowed and even if unopposed.
title: Isawa Sanetomo

flavor: "The sea, the sea! Someday I will travel to the new Colonies, and see the marvelous city I hear tales of. Until then I will listen to the ocean's whispers of it."
"They may certainly try to attack our borders, but we have resources they cannot dream of. The void holds all things."

title: Isawa Tamaki
text: Limited: Look at the top card of your Fate deck. You may put it at the bottom of the deck.

title: Isawa Tamaki
flavor: "She moves like a phantom through the halls of the Imperial Court. Others respect her, perhaps even fear her, but they do not understand her, I think." - Shiba Jikaro
text: Limited: Look at the top card of your Fate deck. You may put it at the bottom of the deck.
Void Limited: Look at the top card of your Fate deck. You may put it at the bottom of the deck.
title: Isawa Tamaki

flavor: "I do not understand my cousin. What could be so interesting about a city made up of the same five elements to be found here at home? What could be more fascinating than the dance of the elements, and how they are all like and unlike the void?"
The legend of the Seven Sohei from the Destroyer War continues to inspire, even decades later.

text:
Itoku has +1F while a Lion Clan player controls him.
Reaction: After an action resolves which bowed your non-Void Ring: Straighten it. You may use each of its abilities an additional time this turn.
title: Itoku

flavor: "This is an insult to our ancestors and our heritage. It must be answered with blood."

text: Battle: Choose a Personality in a discard pile, remove him from the game, and target an enemy Personality: Move him home. Bow him if the Personality you chose was dead.
title: Iuchi Abodan

flavor: "I relish the chance to work with the Crab again."

text:
Kota has +2F while he has a Spell.
Reaction: After an action targets one of your Personalities at Kota's battlefield: Negate the Personality's movement from the action's effects.
title: Iuchi Kota

flavor: He is the latest to uphold an ancient tradition. He does not know if his unique abilities will be needed, and he will fight for the Unicorn until then.

text: Open: Target a Personality without attachments: He may not be assigned, and will not move, to battlefields.
title: Iuchi Shunshi

flavor: "She was born an Utaku, but her training with the Iuchi proved her of such exceptional ability that she was wed into the daimyo's extended family and took their name." - Moto Chen
"She was born an Utaku, but her training with the Iuchi proved her of such exceptional ability that she was wed into the daimyo's extended family and took their name." - Moto Chen

text: Limited: Bow Yupadi or one of her Spells, and target a Personality: Give him Naval.
story: Thank you for your work - Mike Brodu
title: Iuchi Yupadi

flavor: "We control land access to the Colonies. What do the Mantis control? The seas are too vast for any to claim dominion."
designernotes: A Unicorn Water Shugenja.

flavor: "I have lost everything except my life, which has no value. If you wish my help, it is yours, but know the value of that which you desire."

text: While Jahan is at the current battlefield, other players may not play Terrains.
notes: Released in the 2011 Summer Con pack
title: Jahan

flavor: "Some men are great leaders because of their innate brilliance. Others, because of a terrible cruelty." - Kaiu Kawachi
"Some men are great leaders because of their innate brilliance. Others, because of a terrible cruelty." - Kaiu Kawachi

text: Battle: Ranged 4 Attack. If this targeted a card, give the current battlefield's province +2 or -2 strength.
title: Kaiu Esumi

flavor: "The Crab exist in a state of perpetual war, either defending or attacking an eternal foe. I envy the majesty of such a simple existence." - Ikoma Shika

text: Reaction: After engaging at Hideaki's battlefield: Increase its province's strength by 3 until the battle's resolution begins.
title: Kaiu Hideaki

flavor: "Destruction is only the first step."

text:
Limited: You help rebuild another clan's defenses. Gain 3 Honor. You may not declare an attack.
Battle: Target an enemy card with Force lower than or equal to this battlefield's province's strength: Bow it.
title: Kaiu Iemasa

flavor: "Other families wage war, but the Kaiu literally make war. Our every endeavor furthers the cause of the Crab military. We are the architects of destruction, the artisans of death."
"I would prefer that the Empire had not suffered so, but think of the opportunities! Think of the chances to improve, redesign, and rebuild! It is a thrilling time to be alive."

text: Tactical Battle/Open: Nakano has +3F while he is in an army and while all Personalities in that army are Siege.
title: Kaiu Nakano

flavor: As the Empire continued to rebuild and expand, the value of the Kaiu's insights increased tenfold. Some became more important than the average.
designernotes: [Note: Kaiu Genji's son.]

text: Battle: Ranged Attack with strength equal to the current battlefield's province's strength.
title: Kaiu Onizuka

flavor: Thanks to the aid of the Kaiu, the castles of the Scorpion were never more resilient, if a little less menacing.
designernotes: [Note: A Kaiu Engineer who boasts about his impenetrable defenses]

text:
Limited: If none of your provinces have been destroyed since your last turn began, or you are a Scorpion Clan player: Gain 2 Honor.
Battle: Target an enemy card without attachments: Bow it.
title: Kaiu Tojikana

flavor: "We sometimes play a game amongst each other. One Kaiu devises the strongest fortification possible, and the others must figure out its weaknesses. Me? I have never lost."
"No, I do not think so."

text: Iaijutsu Limited: Target another player's Personality. His controller may dishonor him. If he did not choose to dishonor him, gain 1 Honor and choose one of the Personality's abilities; it may not be used until your next turn begins.
title: Kakita Genshi

flavor: "Watch again, and perfect your form."
designernotes: An old Kakita Sensei

text:
After Gonji enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Before you focus: Once per duel, instead of focusing that time, you may give your Crane Clan Personality in the duel +4 to his duel stat until the duel ends.
title: Kakita Gonji

flavor: Even the Scorpion are wary of her sweet words.
designernotes: A young, brash Crane courtier.

text:
After a Battle action targets Kae, you may discard the Imperial Favor to negate Kae's destruction, bowing, and movement from the action's effects.
Battle: Move Kae home.
title: Kakita Kae

flavor: "You are a shame on your lord and your family. These are my words, and I will prove them with my sword if necessary."

text: Battle: Target an enemy dishonorable Personality: Bow him. His controller loses 2 Honor. Gain 2 Honor.
title: Kakita Kazan

flavor: "His technique is overshadowed by the uses he puts it to." - Kakita Gonji
designernotes: A Crane Magistrate knocking someone off their feet.

text: Iaijutsu Reaction: After an action resolves during which Kenta won a duel, target a dishonorable enemy Personality at the current battlefield: Move him home.
title: Kakita Kenta

flavor: "Only through art do the deeds of heroes shine for a thousand years."

text: Reaction: After a duel ends that your Personality won, bow Maratai: She sculpts a statue to honor the winner. Gain 2 Honor. Take the Imperial Favor.
title: Kakita Maratai

flavor: "I am a wicked man, Noritoshi-sama, but I am your man all the same. You are safe here as long as you desire, and I will find the information you need."

text: Political Open: Target a Personality: He may not perform actions until the current phase ends.
title: Kakita Munemori

flavor: "Let them prattle. I am Kakita Noritoshi's vassal, and I will serve him until death."

text:
Your Stronghold's abilities have Tireless.
Favor Political Open: Discard the Imperial Favor to give each of your Provinces +2 strength.
title: Kakita Nara

flavor: "Her songs are a wonder and a delight. She moves the hearts and uplifts the souls of all who hear her." - Isawa Kimi

text: Open: Bow Seishi and target a dishonorable Personality: Rehonor him.
title: Kakita Seishi

flavor: "In the moment of the duel, you think of the duel, and only the duel. After you win, you can think about how much your lord will benefit from your victory."

text: Favor Political Reaction: After the resolution of an action that created a duel that Tadanobu won, discard the Imperial Favor to draw two cards.
title: Kakita Tadanobu

flavor: "The proper task of an artisan is to create beauty. But while this war rages, all of our strength goes to defending the Empire."

text: Limited: Remove a card in your Fate discard pile from the game and target your Personality: Create a +1F/+0C Weapon Item and attach it to him.
title: Kakita Yasunori

flavor: "I will not see my father's lands in chaos. If you bring order, then I am your ally."

text:
After the first time each turn a Political action targets Kamalakar: Negate its effects.
Battle: Kamalakar confounds the enemy. Move Kamalakar home or to a battlefield with enemy units.
notes: Released in the 2011 Summer Con pack
title: Kamalakar

flavor: Spirits sometimes slip free from the realms they call home. When this occurs, an imbalance is created, and there are creatures, hunters, that exist to correct such imbalances.

title: Karyuudo
flavor: The spirits from the realms beyond the mortal world are varied and often terrible. The spirits of Chikushudo are often tenacious and always fearless.
text: (Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to this battle.)

flavor: "To sleep at night a foolish thing. Humans so stupid, not know any better."

text:
After Keppo enters play: Lose 2 Honor.
Battle: If you have Reconnaissance, target an enemy attachment: Destroy it.
title: Keppo

flavor: "With your help I shall avenge your death, brother."
"With your help I shall avenge your death, brother."

text:
Limited: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Samurai • Ancestor • Spirit Personality.
Battle: Bow your performing Ancestor Personality and target an enemy card without attachments: Destroy it. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Kitsu Akai

flavor: "There is nothing more important than protecting our past for the sake of the future."

text: Battle: Bow or destroy your performing Ancestor Personality, and target an enemy card: Bow it. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Kitsu Fukui

flavor: "I implore aid, grandmother, though I am unworthy."

text: Reaction: After Kagako enters play: She summons an ancestor. Create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Samurai • Ancestor • Spirit Personality. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Kitsu Kagako

mrp: Costs 2 less Gold; ability now has Home.

flavor: "My brother taught me the ways of warfare, and a thousand ancestors bolster my weaknesses."

title: Kitsu Miro
flavor: The ancestors of the Lion, like their living counterparts, sometimes find peace and harmony only in war.
text: Home Battle, :bow:: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Ancestor • Samurai • Spirit Personality at the current battlefield. Remove him from the game after the battle ends. (Home actions can be taken from home.)

Home Battle, :bow:: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Ancestor • Samurai • Spirit Personality at the current battlefield. Remove him from the game after the battle ends. (Home actions can be taken from home.)
title: Kitsu Miro

flavor: "Many samurai speak of their ancestors. We speak to them. They are more than our history. They are our land, our bodies, our soul. With them, we are everything. Without them, we are nothing."
"They are in all things, thus all things need be honored."

title: Kitsu Suki
flavor: "Perhaps an acceptable samurai can speak of their own honor, but a great one knows of their grandfather's. And his grandfather, and on."
text: Limited: Each player who controls an Ancestor gains 1 Honor. For any player who controls no Ancestors and has higher Honor than his starting Family Honor, you may choose to have him lose 1 Honor.
Limited: Each player who controls an Ancestor gains 1 Honor. For any player who controls no Ancestors and has higher Honor than his starting Family Honor, you may choose to have him lose 1 Honor.
title: Kitsu Suki

text:
Reaction: After Tamasine enters play: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Samurai • Ancestor • Spirit Personality.
Battle: Bow Tamasine and target your Ancestor, or one to four of your Ancestors if you have lost Honor from another player's action during an Action Phase since your last turn began: Give each target +4F.
title: Kitsu Tamasine

flavor: "By questioning my evidence, you question my methods. By questioning my methods, you question my school. By questioning my school, you question my honor. I demand an opportunity to respond to your slight."

"By questioning my evidence, you question my methods. By questioning my methods, you question my school. By questioning my school, you question my honor. I demand an opportunity to respond to your slight."

text: Iaijutsu Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Daisuke duels him. Move the duel's loser home; if he is dishonorable, this movement will not be negated.
title: Kitsuki Daisuke

flavor: "I am just as mistaken about the evidence as you are mistaken about fashion trends at Winter Court. Tell me about your meeting with the silk merchant, or name your champion."
designernotes: Experienced version of [Kitsuki Magistrate] from EE.

text: Iaijutsu Reaction: After an action resolves during which Daisuke won a duel: Draw a card.
title: Kitsuki Daisuke

flavor: "If the Emerald Champion is corrupt, there is neither evidence nor testimony to prove it. Should we turn a blind eye to his evil, then? I say no."
"If the Emerald Champion is corrupt, there is neither evidence nor testimony to prove it. Should we turn a blind eye to his evil, then? I say no."

text: Limited: Bow Fujimura and target a dishonorable Personality: Fujimura exposes his crimes. His controller loses 2 Honor.
title: Kitsuki Fujimura

flavor: "A worthy attempt! It has been an honor to face you. Surely, in your next life, you will prevail…"

text:
Reaction: After Horume enters play: Choose a player. He gains or loses 1 Honor.
Reaction: After a duel ends that Horume won: He boasts of his talents. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Kitsuki Horume

flavor: "Are you certain this is not a counterfeit?"
designernotes: A Kitsuki Courtier with strong Imperial ties (perhaps wearing the Chrysanthemum mon in addition to his Clan's).

text:
Political Reaction: After an action resolves during which Jakuei won a duel, take the Imperial Favor.
Favor Political Battle: Bow a target enemy Personality. You may discard the Imperial Favor to move him home.
title: Kitsuki Jakuei

flavor: Most courtiers see the Kitsuki Method as an insult to tradition, a defiance of the idea that once a samurai has spoken, nothing else matters. The Kitsuki, for their part, do not care how others feel about their techniques.

The Kitsuki family interpreted their initial failure to explain the disappearance of Mirumoto Mareshi as a failure of their methods. Throughout the Empire, Kitsuki-trained magistrates attempted to find answers to the mystery.

text: Open: Target an attachment: Bow it.
title: Kitsuki Nubane

flavor: "The protocol is obvious, as are the obligations of the challenged in this instance."

text: Political Reaction: After an action targets a target Samurai, bow Yataku: The Samurai's controller may not choose to refuse any challenge created by the action.
title: Kitsuki Yataku

flavor: "The souls of those slain in the Colonies will not rest until they have slaughtered the guilty. I will provide them their solace."

text: Reaction: After Denhei enters play: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Snake • Spirit Personality with the ability, "Open: Target a Personality: He is bitten. His base abilities may not be used."
title: Kitsune Denhei

flavor: "Tell me, brother… Where have the smugglers hidden the cache?"

text: Reaction: After Gina enters play: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Fox • Spirit Personality with the trait, "Enemy attacking Personalities and Followers at this card's battlefield have -1F".
title: Kitsune Gina

flavor: "Let others worry about the Empress and her promises."
designernotes: A Kitsune Shugenja and his two Deer Spirit familiars. (see the art for Kitsune Hisano from FL for inspiration)

text: Reaction: After Haruki enters play: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Deer • Spirit Personality with the ability, "Limited: If another player has higher Family Honor than you: Gain 2 Honor."
title: Kitsune Haruki

flavor: "I do not know what sank those ships, but I will not rest until we discover the cause."

text: Reaction: Once per game, after Hisano enters play: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Fox • Spirit • Unique Personality with the ability, "Battle: Target an enemy attacking Personality: Move him home."
title: Kitsune Hisano

flavor: Many Kitsune strayed far from their home in the Kitsune Forest. Those who traveled to the Colonies still maintain a powerful link to the Realm of Animals.

title: Kitsune Kohaki
flavor: The spirits of the Realm of Animals, Chikushudo, share a special connection to the Kitsune Forest. They have, over the centuries, formed a close bond with the Kitsune family, as well.
text: (Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)

flavor: "What news of home, little one?"

text: Reaction: After Ohsuki enters play: Create a 0F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Sparrow • Cavalry • Spirit Personality with the ability, "Limited: If none of your provinces were destroyed since your last turn ended: Gain 3 Honor."
title: Kitsune Ohsuki

flavor: "I trust you, of course, but my friend has doubts about your intentions in our forest."
"I trust you, of course, but my friend has doubts about your intentions in our forest."

text: Reaction: After Tokoru enters play: Create a 4F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Bear • Spirit Personality with the ability, "Battle: Target an attacking enemy card: Bow it. Destroy it if it is an attachment."
title: Kitsune Tokoru

flavor: "We were brought along to the Kingdoms to facilitate communication, but the Phoenix have made that purpose redundant. We must find new purpose in this land to cement our alliances." - Komori

title: Komori Taruko
flavor: The shugenja of the Bat Clan are tasked with communicating with the spirits of the dead, should the Empress require such a thing. They are not without other gifts, however.
text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)

title: Komori Taruko

flavor: "Catch me if you can, demon! The only prize you will find is death!"
"Catch me if you can, demon! The only prize you will find is death!"

title: Kuni Shinoda

flavor: "It came to fight the Dark Fire. Will it stay with its purifying light, or will it leave now that the threat has passed?" - Shiba Tsukimi

"It came to fight the Dark Fire. Will it stay
with its purifying light, or will it leave now that
the threat has passed?" - Shiba Tsukimi
title: Kunji

text: Battle/Open: Target a Personality: Give him +2F.
title: Kunji

flavor: "With each passing year he looks more like his father, and his fear of becoming like Karatsu grows. I feel his fear is needless, but I am grateful for it." - The Journals of Utagawa

text:
Will not gain a Clan alignment.
Iaijutsu Battle: Target an enemy card without attachments: Destroy it.
title: Kuronada

flavor: The dangers inherent in maintaining relations between the Empire and its Colonies, combined with the depopulation of war for generations, has greatly increased the worth of trustworthy ronin vassals.

text: Open: Give Mahatsu Air, Earth, Fire, or Water.
notes: Released in the 2011 Quarter 4 Organized Play kit

Makito has +1F while a Phoenix Clan player controls him.

Maho Battle: Target an enemy Personality with equal or lower Chi: Destroy a card without attachments in his unit; this destruction will not be negated or delayed.
title: Makito

flavor: "The Kakita study the Kakita. The Mirumoto study the Mirumoto. I study both and will best them all."

text: Iaijutsu Battle: Target an enemy attachment: Destroy it.
notes: Released in the 2011 Quarter 2 Organized Play kit
title: Masatane

flavor: "Whatever you require, my lord. But these are desperate times, and many have need of my talents."

text: Open: If Masaya is face-up in one of your provinces: Bring him into play, paying all costs and paying 2 less Gold. Before the turn ends, put him on top of your Dynasty deck.
notes: Released in the 2011 Summer Con pack
title: Masaya

flavor: "Greatness should be the goal of every samurai. This is not for their gratification, but to honor those who came before them."

text:
Arata has +2F while attacking.
Battle: Target an enemy Personality or Follower: Give it a Force penalty equal to Arata's Personal Honor. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Matsu Arata

flavor: Completely devoid of ambition, his only desire was to wreak havoc in the name of the Lion. His only fear was lasting peace.

title: Matsu Hachiro
text: Hachiro has +2F while attacking.
Hachiro has +2F while attacking.
title: Matsu Hachiro

flavor: "Strength of mind, body and spirit. If you are missing even one, you will not stand."

text: Fear Battle: Target an enemy unit: Bow each card in it with equal or lower Force than Hana. Gain 1 Honor for each card this bowed.
title: Matsu Hana

flavor: "The time for subtlety and brilliance is over. We need brutality and raw power. Now it is my time."

text:
Kaido has +1F while attacking.
Fear Battle: Target an enemy Personality or Follower: Reduce its Force to 0.
title: Matsu Kaido

flavor: "Few would ever guess upon seeing him, but the young Matsu warrior held the soul of a poet within. He could tell a riveting tale that would rival that of the greatest omoidasu." - Kakita Idzuki

text:
Kasei has +2F while attacking.
Battle: Target a defending Personality: Move him home.
title: Matsu Kasei

flavor: "Endless years of peace when a warrior's heart craves war, and now these attacks take place and the clans wish only to discuss it? Where is bushido's fire?"

text: Battle: Target an enemy unit: Reduce the Force of each Personality and Follower in it by Koyama's Personal Honor. Bow any cards in the unit whose Force is now 0.
title: Matsu Koyama

flavor: "I prefer to face my foes with steel, but if they are too cowardly to approach, then they are unworthy to die on my blade."
text: Battle: Bow Misato: Ranged 3 Attack with +1 strength for every 10 points of Family Honor you have.

title: Matsu Misato
flavor: "Do you think age could dull her reflexes? Even time itself seems to cower before Misato-sensei's stare and pauses before her stance." - Matsu Tayuko
text: Battle, :bow:: Ranged 3 Attack with +1 strength for every 10 points of Family Honor you have.
Battle, :bow:: Ranged 3 Attack with +1 strength for every 10 points of Family Honor you have.
notes: This is a distinct card from Matsu Misato from The New Order.
title: Matsu Misato

flavor: "He took a name that means 'gentle' when he became an adult. I assume it was an attempt at irony." - Kitsu Tamasine

text: Ranged Attacks may not target cards in this unit.
title: Matsu Yuuto

text:
Lose 5 Honor.
Battle: Once per turn: Target an Oni in this army and a unit at this battlefield. Minikui no Oni produces Fear against the unit with a strength equal to the Oni's Chi. If the Oni's Gold cost is greater than Minikui no Oni's, this Fear affects Personalities as if they were Followers.

title: Minikui no Oni
flavor: "One of these wretched beasts nearly set us to war with the Crab. Ensure that none of these filth can be found anywhere in our lands." - Akodo Dairuko
text:
After you Recruit Minikui, lose 5 Honor.
Battle: Fear with a strength equal to your target Oni's Chi.

title: Minikui no Oni
flavor: The slavering monstrosity rose from the earth, shattering stone and soil in its path. The villagers screamed, but there was no time to run.
text:
After Miniku enters play: Lose 5 Honor.
Battle: Fear with a strength equal to your target Oni's Chi.

After you Recruit Minikui, lose 5 Honor.
Battle: Fear with a strength equal to your target Oni's Chi.
title: Minikui no Oni

flavor: "You will stand aside, or you will die. I will not tolerate inconvenience to myself or my charge."

text: Reaction: When another player's action would target one of your Shugenja at Ezuno's location, it targets Ezuno instead, if legal.
title: Mirumoto Ezuno

flavor: "Every year, I have the honor of training a new crop of students. Every year, I have the duty to teach them to avoid the mistakes their predecessors have made. It is a joy and a burden, and I revel in both." - The Journal of Kitsuki Fusami
Sun and Moon: two swords, two strikes.
designernotes: A Duelist sensei for the Dragon Clan.

text:
After Hikaro enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Before you focus in a duel involving your Dragon Clan Personality: Once per duel, you may focus from your discard pile instead. Remove that card from the game after the duel ends.
title: Mirumoto Hikaro

flavor: "That the Phoenix ended a threat we should have eliminated long ago is a stain that we will not soon forget. To blame them for such a thing, however, would be petty and shameful."

text: Battle/Open: Target a Personality with a Weapon: Straighten his unit.
title: Mirumoto Houken

flavor: "The years may have robbed me of my speed, but my technique is as crisp as ever."

<i>What do you want?" the old monk said. "What any samurai wants," Ichizo said. "To serve the Empress and my clan." The monk smiled. "I have lived for many years, and I think I can offer you some helpful advice."

text: Iaijutsu Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Ichizo duels him. Destroy the duel's loser.
title: Mirumoto Ichizo

flavor: "I am disturbed by the emergence of this Fusami Technique. We are allies today, but the Crane must prepare for tomorrow." - Kakita Korihime

flavor: "These blades are my burden. No other is fit to bear them."

text:
Weapons attached to Katagi will not be transferred.
Non-Unique Weapons attaching to Katagi from your hand enter play paying 4 less Gold.
title: Mirumoto Katagi

flavor: The history between the Dragon Clan and Naga race was turbulent. When the time came to take up arms against the children of the Black Pearl, some Mirumoto were eager for the chance to slay Naga.

text: Battle: Bow Kojinrue or one of his Weapons, and target an enemy card without attachments: Destroy it.
title: Mirumoto Kojinrue

flavor: "No matter how benign the Naga were once, if they are eager to leap onto my swords, I am happy to oblige them."
designernotes: A proud Dragon Kensai.

flavor: "No matter how benign the Naga were once, if they are eager to leap onto my swords, I am happy to oblige them."

flavor: "My bloodline? I am Dragon. I will not be defined by you."

flavor: "The Dragon of Thunder blessed us years ago. Our clan maintains our devotion to the dragon still. We will not relinquish our commitment, no matter what dissension may strike it."
"Something is disturbing the soul of the ocean. I can feel the turmoil in the waves; I hear trouble in the roar of the surf. Are the Phoenix causing it, or are they also puzzled by it?"

text: Battle resolution does not bow cards in this unit.
title: Moshi Sasako

flavor: "More than two decades and we have barely scratched the surface of the mysteries held in this place. We must forgo the constant securing of position and instead delve with all fervor into our exploration!"
"These lands belong to the Mantis, and the interlopers sent by Iweko are not needed or wanted."
designernotes: A powerful Moshi Shugenja summoning the lightning.

flavor: "These lands belong to the Mantis, and the interlopers sent by Iweko are not needed or wanted."

flavor: "Hiromi-sama's twin sister Harumi forsook all claim to the Championship to take up the duties of a priestess. She will not jeopardize her piety with the distractions of political intrigue, and for that she is worthy of our loyalty."

title: Moshi Yokohime
flavor: "I witnessed the death of a Phoenix through his own eyes. Lady Ikako, I need to understand."

flavor: "Who can escape the power of the Lords? Death comes to all things; it stands behind us and before us. If I must travel over the face of the Empire to teach the correct respect of them, then that is what I will do."

text: After Nosloc enters play, lose 4 Honor.

flavor: "You use the Dark God's power, yet you do not serve him," the ogre said. "Yes," Iuchiband said with a smile, "and I will show you how."
text: Cannot attach Armor or Followers.

flavor: It walked from the very heart of the Shadowlands. It was neither man nor beast, and it walked with haunched shoulders and drooling lips. - Hida Tampako
It was neither man nor beast, and it walked with haunched shoulders and drooling lips. - Hida Kisada

flavor: "There is nothing in the Shadowlands that I fear. There is little that I find worthy of consideration at all. Were I to lower myself to respect such an enemy, however… perhaps a skilled ogre warrior might be such a foe." - Hida Kisada

"Do you see your brothers in my face, samurai? When the Destroyers fall, you are next!"

text: Battle: Give each Ronin Follower and Ronin Personality in Seasoned Ronin's army +1F.
Battle: Give each Ronin Follower and Ronin Personality in Seasoned Ronin's army +1F.

flavor: "These humans fight one another while a fallen god usurps their throne and destroy their lands. They are fools, and yet they do not see it. We will show them how the Shadowlands die, if we must kill them all to do it." - VIII.VI
text: Open: Bow to add or remove a -2F/+3C change token to Shabura. She may not have more than one change token.

flavor: It is difficult to speak of the women of the naga, for reports of their appearance are always contrary.
"My people are no longer numerous. Our temples abandoned, our cities in ruins. We no longer wield the powers we once held. But our tale is not yet concluded."

flavor: "The Shiba stand ready to die in the defense of the clan. That has been our glory since the days of our first ancestors."

flavor: "I think it unwise to explore this ruin without first informing the clan of your discovery, my lord. My duty is to follow, however."

"If we are to give our lives to give Katamari and Benjiro time to defeat the enemy, then we will visit the Shi-Tien Yen-Wang with pride."
"I have studied Akodo's Leadership, but the Lion commanders have found new ways to wage war."

text: Battle: Ranged 4 Attack.

Reaction: After Itao enters play, target a Follower in your hand: Attach it to Itao, paying all costs.

"He proved he had surprising talents at this year's Winter Court and fights like a demon against his enemies. Most important of all, he is a true friend." - Moto Jin-sahn

text: Political Limited: Target a Personality: If he is dishonorable, his controller loses 1 Honor, or 2 Honor if his base Personal Honor is 3 or higher. Dishonor him.
title: Shosuro Kameyoi

flavor: Before being taught the subtle arts, some Scorpion shinobi are taught acrobatics, exotic weaponry, and other esoteric skills. The hope is that the foolish will die in the performance of their duties, so that only the sensible remain to learn the true secrets of the clan.

Before being taught the subtle arts, some Scorpion shinobi are taught acrobatics, exotic weaponry, and other esoteric skills. The hope is that the foolish will die in the performance of their duties, so that only the sensible remain to learn the true secrets of the clan.

title: Shosuro Konishi
text: Battle: Ranged 5 Attack.

title: Shosuro Konishi
flavor: The youngest students of the Shosuro are dressed in black and sent out as a distraction for the clan's enemies. Those who survive are trained in the true secrets of the arts. Some return to the black attire, finding it a suitable tool for a true warrior.
text: Battle: Ranged 5 Attack.
Battle: Ranged 5 Attack.
title: Shosuro Konishi

flavor: Testimony from those high in station eclipses all other forms of proof. Guilt or innocence often hinge on the words of those in power.
"Why, this is exactly what I needed. Thank you for helping me. I will be willing to help you in return if you would like…"

text: Political Open: Bow Makiko: Take the Imperial Favor.
title: Shosuro Makiko

flavor: "I believe I know the perfect opportunity, Rokujo. Leave it to me."
text: Reaction: Even if Orikasa is bowed, after the resolution of one of your Political actions: Straighten Orikasa.

title: Shosuro Orikasa
flavor: "It is like staging a play, really. Everyone sees the actors behind the characters, and a few see the playwright behind the actors. Who sees the carpenters and seamstresses?"
text: Tireless Interrupt: If the action is yours and Political, straighten Orikasa after it resolves.
Tireless Interrupt: If the action is yours and Political, straighten Orikasa after it resolves.
title: Shosuro Orikasa

flavor: With a word she can create or destroy.

text: Political Open: Bow Rin and target an honorable Personality: Rin shames him in a performance. The Personality's controller may dishonor him. If he did not choose this, bow him and negate his straightening (this turn).
title: Shosuro Rin

flavor: "He is often overlooked due to his stature. It is a mistake most will never be able to make a second time." - Shosuro Aroru

text: Battle: Target an enemy card: Bow it. Destroy it if it has no attachments and you control a Courtier.
title: Shosuro Ritoru

mrp: Costs 2 less Gold.

flavor: "If you have the opportunity, sister, we can garner some advantage for our Clan. These papers will prove that the Crane Clan is at fault. They must be found at the proper location."

title: Shosuro Rokujo
flavor:
"Can you even recall how you died?" Akane asked.
The woman could not reply. She only stared with abyssal eyes.
text: (Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)

title: Shosuro Rokujo

mrp: There is a slight difference in the timing of when you can use Rokuta compared to Takuro

flavor: The Scorpion always stand ready to avenge their fallen.

text: Reaction: After the resolution of a battle, or an action or trait from a card that another player owns, if the resolution or card destroyed Rokuta: Create a 0F/2C/1PH Scorpion Clan • Courtier • Apprentice Personality (in your home). Choose a player, who loses 3 Honor.
title: Shosuro Rokuta

flavor: "With the wealth from the Colonies come those who wish to grow rich off of it. Which is fine, until one seeks to do it at the clan's expense. Then I must intervene and correct the wise or dispose of the foolish. Were you still alive, you could figure out which you were."
designernotes: [Note: Art, and maybe flavor text, could show this guy dying, as he is only around to die.]

flavor: "See this blade? It is now yours, at considerable cost to the clan. See to it that our efforts are not wasted."

text: Political Open: Target another Personality: Give him +4F.
title: Shosuro Tanzaki

flavor: At times, a Shosuro lord must bloody his blade.

text: Reaction: After engaging at Toson's battlefield: Discard a card from the current battlefield's province. If this discarded a Personality, you have the first opportunity to take a Battle action in this battle, which must be performed by Toson.
title: Shosuro Toson

flavor: "The Destroyers are iron, but their leaders, their officers, are living creatures. And the living can be killed. Do this, and teach them what it means to cross the Scorpion." - Bayushi Miyako

"The Destroyers are iron, but their leaders, their
officers, are living creatures. And the living can
be killed. Do this, and teach them what it means
to cross the Scorpion." - Bayushi Miyako
title: Shosuro Tsuji

text: Battle: Target an enemy card: Bow it.
title: Shosuro Tsuji

flavor: "Only in challenge is there growth. You see a time of difficulty, I see a dojo without walls."
text: Iaijutsu Battle: Choose your performing Personality, and bow him unless he has won a duel this turn: Bow a target enemy Personality with equal or lower Chi than yours.

title: Shune
flavor: Kenku sightings in Crane lands are more common of late. Many take this is as sign of favor, of good fortune for the Crane. The Champion ponders before the shrine of Doji Yasuyo. He is not so certain.
text: Iaijutsu Battle: Target your unbowed Personality and bow him unless he has won a duel this turn. Bow a target enemy Personality with equal or lower Chi than your Personality.
Iaijutsu Battle: Target your unbowed Personality and bow him unless he has won a duel this turn. Bow a target enemy Personality with equal or lower Chi than your Personality.
title: Shune

flavor: "We have reason to believe that Noritoshi has abandoned all pretense, my lord. He is on his way here, to the Imperial City."

text: Political Battle: Target a Personality with Personal Honor lower than or equal to Komiko's Chi: Bow the Personality. If he is dishonorable, his controller loses 2 Honor.
title: Soshi Komiko

flavor: "It is not ambition that drives me, but rather practicality. If I can be a greater asset to the Scorpion, then why would I not take whatever risk is necessary?"

text: You may equip Air Spells to Neiru as an Open action.
title: Soshi Neiru

flavor: "Do you see any reason to doubt that I have lived in harmony with the elements?"

text: Twice per turn, you may ignore the cost of bowing Yorimi, if it is the cost of a Political action or an action on a Spell.
title: Soshi Yorimi

flavor: "They make it too easy, but I do not complain."
designernotes: [Note: This is Experienced Yoshihara magically controlling someone, forcing them to do as Yoshihara wishes during court so he makes a fool of himself.]

text:
Political Open: Target a Holding or Personality: Its base abilities may not be used.
Political Open: Bow Yoshihara and target a Personality: Dishonor him. If you are a Scorpion Clan or Crab Clan player, his controller loses 1 Honor.
title: Soshi Yoshihara

flavor: "There is tranquility in the heart of the battlefield, and true knowledge in the arterial spray of my enemy as it splashes upon my mask."

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Give him -4F. If his Force is now 0, you may take an additional Battle action which Sugihara must perform.
title: Sugihara

flavor: "Honor is the anvil on which we will shatter the flawed steel of the Great Clans."
text: Battle: Bow a target enemy Personality with lower Force and without a Weapon.

title: Suikotsu
flavor: The Order of the Spider are monks in service to the Spider Clan. One sect within that larger order, the Order of Venom, is responsible for maintaining relations with the greater Brotherhood of Shinsei, tense though those relations might be.
text: Battle: Bow a target enemy Personality with lower Force and without a Weapon.
Battle: Bow a target enemy Personality with lower Force and without a Weapon.
title: Suikotsu

text:
After Suiteiru enters play: Lose 4 Honor.
Open: Destroy your target unbowed Personality: Create a number of 1F Shadowlands • Nonhuman • Oni Followers equal to his Chi. Attach them to one or more of your Personalities. Lose Honor equal to the number of Followers this created.
title: Suiteiru no Oni

flavor: "He strikes with the precision of thought. He kills with the surety of night." - Ninube Shiho

text: Battle: Bow Sutigu or one of his Weapons, and target an enemy card: Negate its straightening (until the turn ends) if it is an attachment. Bow it.
title: Sutigu

flavor: He thought that the ways of the empire meant nothing to him, but now war will not let him be.
"Shall I tell you what Togashi saw before he left?"

text:
Other players' maximum hand sizes are reduced by 1.
Reaction: After another player's Political action targets one of your Personalities: Negate its effects.
title: Taishuu

text:
After Takasho enters play: Lose 3 Honor.
Battle: If any enemy units are at the current battlefield: Move Takasho there. You may take an additional Battle action which Takasho must perform.
Maho Battle: Ranged 5 Attack.
title: Takasho

flavor: "Why am I here? Where else should I be? Heaven's newest daughter is battling the Champion of Jigoku. There are no battles to be found like the battles here."
"You seek to cut the earth with a blade?"

text:
Kazushige has +2F while defending.
Open: If it is another player's turn, target one of his Personalities: Before this phase ends, straighten him. Before this turn ends, if the Personality did not assign to attack this turn, gain 2 Honor.
title: Tamori Kazushige

flavor: "There, there, and there. Attack those three points, and your rival's castle will crumble."

title: Tamori Kusugi
flavor: "I am sorry, friend Scorpion. I would spare you the ignominy of this defeat, but it was you who brought war to these lands."
text: Battle: Even if Kusugi is not at the current battlefield, bow him: Raise or lower the current battlefield's province's strength by 4 (until the turn ends).
Battle: Even if Kusugi is not at the current battlefield, bow him: Raise or lower the current battlefield's province's strength by 4.

flavor: "Two bottles will be sufficient. You do want some to survive, after all."
"Two bottles will be sufficient. You do want some to survive, after all."

text:
Your other Earth Personalities have +1F while defending.
Battle: Target an enemy card: Bow it if it is attacking or has no attachments. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Tamori Muzu

flavor: "Redemption. That is what we seek. Our family was founded by a traitor, and his successor also came from our ranks. We may never be able to cleanse the stain of that shame, but our duty demands that we try."

text: Reaction: After the resolution of your action that bowed a Personality, target a Personality at the same location: Bow him.
title: Tamori Ruya

flavor: "Master the earth, and you will have the most faithful of mounts. It does not tire, needs no food or water, and will never flee in fear. What more do I need?"
designernotes: A young Tamori Shugenja who moves by making the earth obey him.

flavor: “Only an uncultured brute would exploit the gifts of the kami for war.” – Asahina Akahiko

text: (Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to this battle. Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
title: Tamori Seiken

flavor: "His work is absolutely essential to our endeavors. Without him, how much knowledge would already have been lost?" - Seppun Tashime

text: Limited: If you control a Temple, bow Shosei or one of your Temple Holdings: Shosei prays to the Fortunes. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Tamori Shosei

flavor: "As always, they insist that their paths are their own, and that no others are fit to judge their conduct. Their secrecy and eccentricity raise unsettling questions." - Isawa Mitsuko
"As always, they insist that their paths are their own, and that no others are fit to judge their conduct. Their secrecy and eccentricity raise unsettling questions." - Isawa Mitsuko
"It is wonderful how the kami can be called upon to aid or to destroy, is it not?"

text:
Yayu has +2F and Cavalry while it is not your turn.
Battle: Bow or destroy one of Yayu's Spells: He lobs an alchemical potion at the enemy. Ranged 5 Attack.
title: Tamori Yayu

flavor: Steel whispers softly Cloth rips, flesh yields, veins sunder Blood flows, a feud ends - Rezan

title: Tarui
flavor: "It matters little how old you are, how unpleasant you are. If you are skilled enough with a blade, then someone will pay you to use it. You just have to decide if it is worth it to do what they ask."
text: (Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists.)

title: Tarui
flavor: "That Crane interfered with my contract with the Mantis. I would kill him for the insult alone, not to mention the koku he cost me."

text: (Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists.)
title: Tarui

flavor: "Yes, yes, this is perfect! The location is excellent! The samurai will need parangu to cut these plants, and larger clay bottles for the heat. I will be a wealthy man!"

text: Open: Bow Tashiki and target a Market or Port Holding: Straighten it.
notes: Released in the 2011 Summer Con pack
title: Tashiki

flavor: "Stand tall, my brothers. While we remind the Empire of the Spider Clan's power, our brothers wage war for the Empress. A time of great glory comes very soon."

text:
Battle: Target an attachment: Destroy it.
Battle: Target an enemy Personality with fewer Weapons: Destroy him.
title: Tetsuo

text:

Battle: Target an enemy Personality: If he is Nonhuman, take control of him (he joins your army). If he is human, bow his unit. Destroy him before this turn ends.

flavor: "We call ourselves masters of the sea. But we are merely deceiving ourselves." - Yoritomo Sunagawa

text: After The Great Death enters play: Create three 1F Shadowlands • Nonhuman • Raptor • Cavalry • Undead Followers, attach them to it, and lose 6 Honor.
title: The Great Death

flavor: "The loss of the Ivory Kingdoms' warriors means that many horrors they held in check now wander the world." - Yoritomo Singh

text: Battle: Target one or two attachments, or a Personality without attachments, with a total Force lower than The Red Hunger's Force: He swallows them whole. Destroy the targeted cards.

flavor: "You set me free, dark master. Name your enemies, and I will end them for you."

text:
Enters play paying 1 less Gold for each Nonhuman you control, up to 3 less Gold.

flavor: "Before man walked the earth, we were cursed. Our greatest strength became our greatest weakness."

text:

mrp: Costs 2 less Gold; trait is now an Interrupt action.

flavor: "Her manner may be pleasing, and her presence welcome, but if she will not attire herself appropriately, I cannot permit her to attend services." - Asahina Yasutora

title: Togashi Korimi
flavor: "Is modesty not a form of pride? I thought you were above such things, Shiba-sama." The ambassador did not argue, but neither did his face cease its blushing.

Korimi has +2F while defending.

flavor: "You say a force of Naga threatens us? It hardly matters to me. The Empire has faced greater threats and yet still stands. Disturb my meditation again, and I will show you why I have faith in the strength of our defenders."

text: Battle/Open: Even if Osawa is bowed, target a Personality at Osawa's location: Bow or straighten him.
title: Togashi Osawa

flavor: "On the contrary," he called as he made his leap, "this is exactly what rooftops were made for."
designernotes: A bulky Togashi Monk with a prominent Centipede Tattoo.

text: Battle: Even if Rikyou is bowed, if any enemy units are at the current battlefield: Move him there. Straighten his unit if he moved.
title: Togashi Rikyou

flavor: "Like you, I revel in the world, including sake. Unlike you, I find a reversal of fortunes to have gratifying effects."

text:
Limited: Give Sakata a +1F Fire or Sake token.

mrp: Unlike Shintaro, Torazo gets his Fire tokens from a Reaction

flavor: "My enlightenment shall be found in battle, on the bodies of my victims."
"My enlightenment shall be found in battle, on the bodies of my victims."

Reaction: After Torazu enters play: Give him three +1F Fire tokens.
Battle: Destroy a Fire token on Torazu: Ranged 3 Attack.
title: Togashi Torazu

flavor: "He arrived atop the mountain, claiming descent from Togashi Akagi. He has his father's gifts, and his father's curse of rage. Let us hope we can bring him more peace than his father knew." - Mirumoto Shikei

title: Togashi Tsukagi
flavor: "The pattern holds. A fall, a rise. A man learns the cost of his bargain. There will be a break from within, and a storm will rip apart our very hearts. Pain and rage await us all, and I can unleash myself. Pain and rage. For myself and for my enemies."
"She was our conscience, and my salvation." - Makito
designernotes: Experienced version of Isawa Tokiko (from The Truest Test), though she's now retired to become a Monk.

text:
Tokiko has +1F while a Phoenix Clan player controls her.
Battle/Open: Destroy Tokiko and target your dead Personality: Bring him into play in your home or at the current battlefield, paying all costs but paying 7 less Gold.
title: Tokiko

flavor: "We will find Fubatsu, or those who took him. We will not suffer a serpent to live…"

text: Battle: Bow your performing Follower: Ranged 4 Attack which may target a Personality with attached Followers if you have Reconnaissance.
title: Toritaka Chokichi

flavor: "The other families protect the Empire from the Shadowlands, but we Toritaka protect it from the Spirit Realms. It is a different task, but the similarities and dangers are many."

text: Ranged Attacks from actions performed by cards in Shishido's army have +1 strength.
title: Toritaka Shishido

flavor: "Under Iweko I, the Empire prospered. The heavens showered their blessings upon Rokugan, in ways both obvious and subtle." - The writings of Miya Shoin

"The massive Wyrm shook the earth with its fury. Atop it, the Son of Fire cackled and ordered the beast forward. When all seemed lost, the Heavens opened, and answered my pleas. Then the noble ryu, children of the dragons, surged forth to confront the twisted abomination." - Tamori Sugi
"What's the problem? Zombies die to an arrow in the head, just like everything else."
text: Battle: If the current battlefield's province has been targeted by a Recon action this turn and Gosho is face-up in one of your provinces: Bring him into play at the current battlefield, paying 2 less Gold. If he entered play, Ranged 3 Attack.

title: Tsuruchi Gosho
flavor: "I have been told that it is a simple trick, to shoot an unprepared foe. Perhaps so. But it is an exceptionally effective trick."
text:
(You may Recruit a Reserve Personality, if he would be opposed, as an Absent Battle action.)
Thunder Interrupt: After you Recruit Gosho at this battlefield, Ranged 3 Attack.

(You may Recruit a Reserve Personality, if he would be opposed, as an Absent Battle action.)
Thunder Absent Interrupt: After you Recruit Gosho at this battlefield, Ranged 3 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Gosho

mrp: Unlike Mukami, Isas is Naval

flavor: "My arrow and its perfect flight is the only thing that never strays. I will never love or trust again. I serve my clan, and that is the only thing that defines me."

text: Battle: Bow Isas: Ranged 3 Attack. Move Isas home.
title: Tsuruchi Isas

flavor: "Brilliant, beautiful, and virtuous. She is all that is right and true within our clan. We can become greater if we but become more like her." - Yoritomo Hiromi

title: Tsuruchi Kosoko
text: Battle: Ranged 5 Attack.
Battle: Ranged 5 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Kosoko

flavor: "There are two things that I love above all else: money and justice. Truly my job is a blessed one."

text: Battle: Ranged 4 Attack. If the Ranged Attack destroyed a card, you may target and straighten a Holding.
title: Tsuruchi Nobukatsu

flavor: "He is the greatest hunter in the realm. He tracked a traitor across the Colonies and mainland Rokugan for seven months. He returned with his head." - Yoritomo Hiromi

text: Battle: Ranged 6 Attack that you compare against Gold Cost.
title: Tsuruchi Samuru

flavor: "He does not rely on just words to inspire." - Yoritomo Hiromi
designernotes: A sensei for the Mantis Clan.

text:
After Shichiro enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
After a Ranged Attack action resolves that your Mantis Clan Personality performed: Once per battle, you may move him home.
title: Tsuruchi Shichiro

flavor: "The Spider were not welcomed openly, but at least they had a purpose. The other clans that are arriving, one by one, serve no purpose other than to take what belongs to us."
designernotes: A young and reckless Tsuruchi Scout.

flavor: "I never dreamed to find myself in a land such as this, with wonders such as these. If this is my duty, then truly I have been blessed."
"I never dreamed to find myself in a land such as this, with wonders such as these. If this is my duty, then truly I have been blessed."

title: Tsuruchi Tomaru
text: Battle: Twice per turn: Ranged 3 Attack.
Battle: Twice per turn: Ranged 3 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Tomaru

flavor: "With each mile we find wonders unimagined. The other clans sully this land as they scramble to place their claims. This place is to be unfolded, not torn open through petty squabbles."
designernotes: Experienced version of [New Mantis Scout] from EE.

text: Battle: Twice per turn: Ranged 4 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Tomaru

flavor: "Every step I take within these cursed jungles, I feel eyes upon me. What shadows haunt this place I do not know, but I do no doubt their presence."

text: Reaction: After you announce an action, if Yakusho is at the current battlefield: Ranged Attacks from the action's effects will not have their strength reduced.
title: Tsuruchi Yakusho

flavor: "They have both wronged us, but a brother from a different clan is still a brother."

"They have both wronged us, but a brother
from a different clan is still a brother."
title: Tsuruchi Yashiro

text:
Enters play paying 2 less Gold if you are a Lion Clan or Scorpion Clan player.
Battle: Bow Yashiro unless you have Reconnaissance: Ranged 4 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Yashiro

flavor: The demons tested Rokugan's defense day and night. They lacked organization, but their sheer power more than compensated for that fact.
<i>"Tell me, Asako-sama," Yori hissed to the lump of flesh that had been a man, "how does it feel to lose your name?"
Junzo looked upon his new creation and smiled. "Let us see Toturi out-maneuver this!"

text:
After Ugulu enters play: Lose 5 Honor.
Before a Human Personality moves to Ugulu's battlefield: Negate his movement.
title: Ugulu no Oni

flavor: "Do you require the wisdom of ten lifetimes, child?"

text:
Unmei has Earth, Thunder, Courtier, Samurai, Shugenja, Cavalry, Duelist, Magistrate, Naval, Scout, and/or Tactician while you control another Mantis Clan Personality with the same keyword.
While Unmei has Samurai or Shugenja, it has +3F and "Battle: Bow Unmei: Ranged 5 Attack."
title: Unmei

flavor: "None will dare question our loyalty again. We stand with Rokugan, now and forever!"

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality with lower Personal Honor: Bow him. Gain 2 Honor.
title: Utaku Eun-ju

flavor: "When our hidden enemies destroyed the Shinomen Tower, they killed my brothers… I must keep my calm when we enter battle or I will lose everything."

text: Negate Ji-Yun's dishonoring from other players' cards' effects.
title: Utaku Ji-Yun

flavor: "Rokugan is ignorant of what we have accomplished. They sleep while we serve."
designernotes: A Unicorn Battlemaiden.

text:
While Lishan is attacking, she has +1F and +1PH.
Reaction: After you announce a Battle action, if Lishan is at the current battlefield, target a Personality or Follower opposing her: Give it a Force penalty equal to Lishan's Personal Honor.

flavor: "Your will, my hands, Lady Naleesh."

text:
After the resolution of an action that gave a Force penalty to an enemy card at Liu-Xeung's battlefield: Give Liu-Xeung +1F.
Battle: Target an enemy Personality with lower Personal Honor: Move him home. Gain 1 Honor.

flavor: "The betrothal of Unicorn and Dragon Champions is a matter of increasing debate."
"The betrothal of Unicorn and Dragon Champions is a matter of increasing debate."

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality or Follower: You may move Mai to the current battlefield. If she is now there, give the targeted card a Force penalty equal to Mai's Personal Honor.

flavor: The Utaku Battle Maidens form the greatest heavy cavalry unit in the world. Their strength is unrivaled.

text: Reaction: After engaging at Ryoko's battlefield, target a Personality or Follower opposing her: Give it a Force penalty equal to Ryoko's Personal Honor.

flavor: "I have been honored to serve with the Amethyst Champion, but duty first brings me to war. With her blessing I fight in her name."

text: Reaction: After a Personality assigns or moves, if he is now opposing Tairu: Draw a card.
title: Utaku Tairu

mrp: Unlike Fusae, Tsukiko is a paragon

flavor: "Your beauty inspires me to wax on with endless plays and poems. Will you one day do me the honor of your blessing?" - Anonymous note

title: Utaku Tsukiko

text:
Lose 3 Honor.
Battle: Fear 3.

flavor: If your jade wears out, his incessant mumbling begins to form itself into words and makes perfect sense.
"Not all those who once followed Toturi are heroes." - Seppun Jin
In the days when the Emperor was possessed by the Dark God, even the heroes doubted if they would triumph. Some made pacts with evil for their own safety...
Voitagi was to assassinate Toturi before the Day of Thunder. Yobi robbed him of his moment of glory and left him in a shallow grave.

title: Voitagi
flavor: "Why have I wakened again? What purpose am I meant to fulfill before I can embrace oblivion forever?"
text:
After Voitagi enters play, lose 3 Honor.
Battle: Fear 3 (Bow a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 3 or lower Force).

After Voitagi enters play, lose 3 Honor.
Battle: Fear 3 (Bow a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 3 or lower Force).
title: Voitagi

flavor: "The destruction of our lands has unleashed the wrath of the spirits. Our dead visit their anger upon the Destroyers, and I celebrate them for it." - Soshi Yukimi

text: Battle: Target a card without attachments in a unit led by a dishonorable Personality: Destroy the targeted card.
title: Wrathful Dead

flavor: "Fire gone, yes, but not danger. Foolish humans."

text:
If you are the Defender, Xijkt may be targeted by the rulebook Cavalry player ability.
Battle, :bow:: Bow a target enemy card without attachments. You may bow one of your Mines to ignore the cost of bowing Xijkt.
title: Xijkt

flavor: The abominations that attacked the Spider in the distant colonies were as different from the Naga of Rokugan as were the salamanders from the Burning Sands. Slowly, the truth of their race began to unfold.

text: Your Holdings produce 1 additional Gold when they bow to produce Gold.

designernotes: A freakishly big and strong Crab Berserker, even by Crab Berserker standards. Was experimented on by an evil Shugenja, was freed and sent to the wall to die with honor, though no Oni yet has been able to kill it.

text:
Battle: Ranged 6 Attack.
Battle: Target an enemy card with the base Shadowlands keyword: Destroy it.

designernotes: A young Crab Scout who adheres to the teachings of Fudo.

text: Battle: Target two Personalities controlled by the same player: Transfer a Follower from one to the other. If you have Reconnaissance, you may take an additional action.

(The Defender may draw a card after a Brash card is assigned to attack.)

(Each other player may draw a card after an Overconfident card enters or leaves play.)
Other players' maximum hand sizes are increased by 1.

text: Battle: Bow Kitahime unless you have Reconnaissance: Ranged 4 Attack.

Reaction: After Hiroto enters play: Give him four +1F Fire tokens.

(The Defender may draw a card after a Brash card is assigned to attack.)

designernotes: [Art Note: A Lion Paragon who is inspiring, increasing your effective Honor while he is around. This guy is also pissed at the Kitsuki for demanding the Lion provide evidence of the Spider's crimes.]

Hotaka has +1PH if any other player is Dragon Clan.
Hotaka may not perform Dark Virtue actions.
The amount of Honor you need in order to win an Honor Victory is reduced by Hotaka's Personal Honor minus one.

designernotes: [Art Note: This is an Ikoma Sensei who teaches his students by using games.]

After Aimi enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your Lion Clan Personalities (in play) have Courtier but do not have Cavalry, Commander, Deathseeker, Paragon, Scout, or Tactician.

flavor: "Another fine spot for an ambush," the scout mused.
designernotes: [Art Note: A brash Lion Scout who is a bit overconfident in his abilities. Is part of the Imperial Force who get attacked by the Unicorn.]

text:
(The Defender may draw a card after a Brash card is assigned to attack.)
Battle: Target an enemy card without attachments: Bow it.

flavor: When they came for him, they saw one man. When they died, they had lost count of the spirit warriors.
designernotes: [Art Note: A Kitsu Shugenja.]

text: Battle: Bow Kouki and target an enemy Personality: Give him -3F.
title: Kitsu Kouki

flavor: "The Shogun's man is a peerless warrior, entrusted with the most important tasks. It is honor that elevates him, but honor that blinds him as well." - Yasuki Tsujiken
designernotes: [Art Note: Matsu Koyama is the new Imperial Yojimbo from the GenCon tournament win.]

text: Battle: Give each other Lion Clan Personality in your army a Force bonus equal to his own Personal Honor.
title: Matsu Koyama

flavor: "Don't worry about our holdings here. No Crane will get past my vigilance."
designernotes: He's a beekeeper; his bees swarm and sting you to death.

text: Reaction: After Merihiko enters play: Create a 0F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Bee • Cavalry • Spirit • Swarm Personality with the ability, "Battle: Bow this card: Ranged 4 Attack."

text: Battle: Ino summons a storm. After the next action not performed by a Thunder Personality resolves this battle, the player who took it chooses to discard a card or bow the performer. You may take an additional Battle action.
title: Moshi Ino

flavor: "Go well, my children."
designernotes: The Thunder Dragon has always had the ability to bow an enemy, now she can channel that ability through her shugenja.  Also has the 'rising storm' mechanic (Force bonus from Thunder actions)

text:
After Thunder Dragon performs an action: Other players may not take Reactions until it ends.
The Thunder Dragon inspires. Your Mantis Clan Personalities have +1F and the ability, "Battle: Target an enemy card without unbowed attachments: Bow it."
title: Thunder Dragon

flavor: "The Crane? What are they but a band of spoiled children? We will drive them from the Colonies with little effort."
designernotes: Boxable support for RAs

text:
(The Defender may draw a card after a Brash card is assigned to attack.)
Battle: Ranged 2 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Kohrogi

flavor: "No the most promising class I have ever seen, but I will turn them into magistrates regardless."
designernotes: The Ruby Champion is a Sensei.  I think since we have a mechanic for that, we should use it.  This Mantis Sensei is for Economic Warfare.

text:
After Nobukatsu enters play or overlays: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your Mantis Clan Samurai in and out of play have Magistrate.
Battle: Target a Personality at any location: Bow him.
title: Tsuruchi Nobukatsu

flavor:
"You have served long as a mercenary," Hiromi said. "Have you forgotten what it is like to serve your clan?"
"Never, my lord," Akukiho replied. "All I have done is kept myself sharp for the day you needed me."
designernotes: Uses a weaving and rolling Mantis combat style

text: Battle: Target a Weapon in your hand: Attach it to Akukiho, paying all costs. You may take an additional Battle action.
title: Yoritomo Akukiho

flavor: "Now things will get interesting. We have many advantages, but we must push them to their limit if we are to defeat the Crane and claim their holdings."
designernotes: Brash Magistrate

text: Limited: If Iwashi has been in an attacking army when it won a battle since your last turn began, target a Personality: Bow him.

designernotes: Experienced version of Asako Chukage from FL.

text:
Limited: Bow your target Ring: Draw a card.
Battle: Even if Chukage is bowed: If he would be opposed, move him to the current battlefield. If he moved, straighten his unit. If there are now more units there on the enemy side than on yours, you may target an enemy unit and move it home.
title: Asako Chukage

flavor: "Do not do this. It will not end the way you would like."
designernotes: An Asaka Henshin with Earth manipulation powers.

text: Battle/Open: Target a Personality with 1 Force or greater: Switch his Force and Chi. You may switch Jukko's Force and Chi.

flavor: "The other clans must face the truth. Purity must be attained, not assumed!"
designernotes: An older Isawa Inquisitor who really dislikes Fudo adepts

text:
(Each other player may draw a card after an Overconfident card enters or leaves play.)
Other players' maximum hand sizes are increased by 1.

flavor: He tells himself he shall not succumb. Is it hubris or insight that fills him?
designernotes: Experienced version of Asako Rikate from SC.

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Reduce his Force to 0. Give him -2C.
story: 2011 Favored of the Earth Dragon - Kyle Anderson
title: Asako Rikate

flavor: "There is an easier way to attain the goal you seek."
designernotes: An Isawa Fire Tensai casting a spell from a burning scroll.

text: Battle/Open: After the next time this turn you announce an action on one of Momoko's Spells, ignore the action's bowing costs. You may take an additional action.
title: Isawa Momoko

flavor: "I promise, you will be safe."
designernotes: A young, brash Shiba Yojimbo.

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality or Follower: Give it -4F. If its Force is now 0 and you control a Shugenja, you may target and destroy a card without attachments in the target's unit.

flavor: "Most magistrates retire before his age, but Makebesu continues to serve. It is almost as if something drives him… perhaps something left unfinished?" - Bayushi Nitoshi
designernotes: A Scorpion Magistrate in court.

text: After Makubesu enters play: Create two 1F Followers and attach them to one or two of your Personalities.
title: Bayushi Makubesu

flavor: A razor tongue cuts as surely as a blade.
designernotes: A Scorpion Courtier in the Colonies shaming someone for not accepting the words of Fudo.

text:
(Each other player may draw a card after an Overconfident card enters or leaves play.)
Political Reaction: After Mugoshi enters play, choose a player: You slander him for not accepting the teachings of Fudo. He loses 1 Honor.
title: Bayushi Mugoshi

flavor: "These events were inevitable. Those who did not see them coming are simply fools."
designernotes: A grizzled and old Bayushi Shibata.

text: Battle: Even if Shibata is not at the current battlefield, target an attacking Personality: Shibata draws on his knowledge of the land. Bow the target. Give the current battlefield's province +3 strength if the target is dishonorable.
title: Bayushi Shibata

flavor: "Let her hunt them, my lord. She is the only one who can." - Shosuro Aroru

text: Reaction: After a Battle action resolves, if Hawado is at the current battlefield, target a Personality that performed it: Move him from his current location to another.
title: Shosuro Hawado

text: After Kodanshi enters play from a Province, create a 0F/2C/0PH Ninja Scorpion Clan Personality.
designernotes: A Scorpion Ninja.

text: After Kodanshi enters play from a Province, create a 0F/2C/0PH Ninja Scorpion Clan Personality.
title: Soshi Kodanshi
