designernotes: A Yogo Yojimbo that thinks she isn't affected by the Yogo curse putting her charge in harm's way to trap the enemy.

text: Battle: Target your Courtier and an enemy Personality: Move them to the current battlefield. Straighten the enemy Personality's unit.
title: Yogo Heijin

flavor: "There is a temple in the jungles that the Spider did not report. Go and find it." - Bayushi Shibata
designernotes: A Scorpion Shugenja.

text: Reaction: After Ugimori enters play from a province, choose a player: He may not take the Proclaim action until your next turn begins.
title: Yogo Ugimori

designernotes: [Art Note: A brash Spider who is fighting the small skirmishes with the Scorpion in the jungle.]

text:
After Yamato enters play: Lose 1 Honor and if any other player is Scorpion Clan, permanently remove Brash from Yamato. (The Defender may draw a card after a Brash card is assigned to attack.)
Battle/Open: Target your Follower at any location: Transfer it to Yamato. You may take an additional action.
title: Daigotsu Yamato

designernotes: [Art Note: a Spider Paragon]

text:
After Yutaka enters play: Lose 1 Honor.
Yutaka may not perform Bushido Virtue actions.
Battle: If Yutaka is dead and he would be opposed: Bring him into play at the current battlefield, paying 3 less Gold if you have taken a Dark Virtue action this phase.
title: Daigotsu Yutaka

designernotes: [Art Note: This the Story requested infiltrator of the Colonial underground.]

text:
After Asuka enters play: You may give control of her to another player.
Asuka may not assign, and will not move, into a defending army.
After a Straighten Phase begins: Choose your bowed non-Spider Clan Personality. Negate his straightening this phase.
title: Goju Asuka

flavor: "My special child," the Shadow Dragon chuckled. "Born not just of my spirit, but my flesh as well."
designernotes: [Art Note: This is experienced Yurishi. He uses crazy Goju stuff to edirect actions off himself to one of his puds, but then replicates that action back at the enemy army.]

text:
After Yurishi enters play: Lose 3 Honor.
Other players may not target Yurishi with actions if any other legal targets are available.
title: Goju Yurishi

flavor: Like phantoms, the Spider agents slipped beyond the Lion border and into one of their most remote Colonial holdings. "Do not let it touch your flesh!" the monk snarled as they ladled out the blood. "I do not wish to carry your carcass out of here!"
designernotes: [Art Note: Generic Spider Monk]

text: Reaction: After Masayoshi enters play: Create a +4F/+1C Weapon Item and attach it to him.
title: Masayoshi

flavor: "Do not fear death. I will be a greater you than you have ever been. Feel honored in this."
designernotes: [Art Note: A Ninube turning someone's brain to mush.]

text:
After Hajime enters play, lose 2 Honor.
Ninja Battle: Target an enemy Personality at the current battlefield. Hajime turns his mind to rice pudding and he wanders off. Move him to a different location.
title: Ninube Hajime

flavor: "What amazing tools these are! A pity there are so few of the big ones around. Imagine what I could do with carriers who could follow directions!"
designernotes: A Chuda Shugenja still toying with the Plague.

text:
After Seki enters play: Lose 3 Honor.
Reaction: After Seki enters play, target a Personality: Give him a -1C Plague token.
title: Chuda Seki

flavor: "Understanding breeds understanding."
designernotes: A major figure in the cult of Fudo.

text:
After Mukudori enters play, discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your other Fudo cards enter play for 1 less Gold.
Limited: Bow three of your Fudo cards to draw a card.
title: Mukudori

flavor: "All are one, child. We are nothing."
designernotes: [Art Note: This is the new Grand Master of the Elements. I am hiding this info from playtest, but he will have all of the Elemental keywords (and maybe Thunder) on his final version. Art should show his absolute mastery of the Elements.]

text:
Reaction: If it is the Action Phase or Mahatsu is at the current battlefield, before an action with Thunder or an element keyword resolve, negate its effects.
Limited: Search your Fate deck for a card with Thunder or an element keyword. Show it. Put it in your hand.
title: Naka Mahatsu

designernotes: The Imperial Governor of the Colonies.

text:
You may not assign, and will not move, Suikihime to battlefields. Suikihime will not become dishonorable. Other players' Political actions may not target Suikihime.
Reaction: Once per game, after Suikihime enters play, if no other player controls The Forgotten Temple: Suikihime grants you new lands in the Colonies. Gain a province to the left of your leftmost province. After the next time this game Suikihime leaves play, destroy your leftmost province.
title: Otomo Suikihime

flavor: "A magistrate's highest duty is to serve the Empire's law. Do whatever else you must, but do that."
designernotes: [Art Note: An Emerald Magistrate sensei]

text:
After Nagi enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your other non-Loyal Magistrate Personalities in and out of play have your Clan alignment.
title: Seppun Nagi

flavor: "My honored father thinks I will grow weak and crawl back to his clan. The Void contains the Phoenix but it does not need them, and neither do I."
designernotes: [Art Note: This is the ex-Phoenix who had a fall out with her dad that Story requested.]

text:
Tanemono will not be controlled by a Phoenix Clan player.
Battle/Open: Switch Tanemono's Force and Chi.
title: Tanemono

flavor: "Come talk with me, and I will tell you how to be a leader of men."
designernotes: A generic Sensei, set honor req to keep out of Spider decks, but he is available for all other EE Commander builds.

text:
After Zansho enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your Followers have +1F or a Force bonus equal to their Honor Requirement, whichever is greater.
title: Zansho

flavor: "You will receive reinforcements at the right moment. Have faith."
designernotes: [Art Note: A generic infantry Unicorn Tactician. We could probably use the slushed Shinjo T'sao art for him if we wish, or just leave it in slush for an emergency.]

text: Battle/Open: Even if Aoi is at home, bow him and target a Personality: Give him +4F.
title: Moto Aoi

flavor: Words of death rose in the shugenja's mouth, and ranks upon ranks fell away before them.
designernotes: [Art Note: Vanilla Unicorn Shugenja, though he is a Conqueror which is rare for Unicorn.]

flavor: "He is a dour man, and personally I find his motives suspect. He has never failed in his duties, however, and his man Koyama is a paragon of honor." - Seppun Ritisharu
designernotes: [Art Note: This is the new Shogun. I made him a conqueror because that seemed fitting for the Shogun.]

text:
Taigo may perform up to three Tactical actions per turn.
Tactical Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Bow him. If he is Infantry, you may target and destroy a card without attachments in his unit.
story: 2011 Shogun of the Empire - AJ Valle
title: Moto Taigo

flavor: "You had me the first time."
designernotes: [Art Note: The brash Unicorn Commander who gives the order to attack the Lion and Imperial forces on the Ki-Rin's Path]

text:
Katsuo does not have Brash if any other player is Lion Clan. (The Defender may draw a card after a Brash card is assigned to attack.)
Battle/Open: Target your Follower: Straighten it. You may take an additional action.
title: Shinjo Katsuo

flavor: In her meditations, she saw tranquil formations.
designernotes: [Art Note: A Battle maiden who focus more on the honor side of things.]

text:
Your dishonorable Battle Maidens do not have a maximum Personal Honor of 0 from the rulebook.
Limited: Gain 2 Honor. You may not declare an attack this turn.
title: Utaku Chikako

flavor: It was rarely a good sign when a horse laid down.
designernotes: [Art Note: This is the beleaguered male Utaku stable master that Story requested.]

text: Open: Bow Hirononri and target a Stables or Cavalry card: Straighten it.
title: Utaku Hirononri

designernotes: Art Note: The Experienced version of [Ronin Leader].

text:
After Tamahime enters play or overlays: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your other Ronin Personalities have Tactician.
Your other Ronin cards enter play paying 1 less Gold.
Battle: Target an enemy card without attachments: Destroy it.
notes: Released in the special Imperial Assembly pack in May 2013
title: Tamahime

flavor: "The fury and brilliance of Tamago tempered by the patience and wisdom of Utagawa. If you hope to defeat her, best to kill her in her sleep. Otherwise, you will fail." - Genjiro
designernotes: [Art Note: This is a Ronin Leader who teaches and inspires his fellow Ronin. Would like him to be the next Ronin "Champion" assuming Tamago did not make the time jump.

text:
After Tamahime enters play: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
Your other Ronin Personalities have Tactician.
notes: Released in the special Imperial Assembly pack in May 2013
title: Tamahime

flavor: "My curse is to live. I live when all others die. To take one's own life is a Crab's greatest cowardice. I must live to find that which can kill me."

text: Reaction: After another player's Battle action resolves, if its effects destroyed Yamadera: Melee 8 Attack.
title: Hida Yamadera

flavor: "Some enjoy the trials of life, and others prefer to immerse themselves in games. The truth is that the greatest joy is in the games life offers us."

text: Political Open: Take the Imperial Favor.
title: Doji Dainagon

flavor: "The distractions of the physical world are an obstacle we must overcome to reach the truth of enlightenment. Conflict, debate, politics, even clothing can stand in our path."

text: Limited: Draw a card.
title: Togashi Korimi

flavor: "The beast can appear anywhere in the Empire, and even the Colonies, carrying out the will of its mistress. There are many mysteries in the world, but I find the Jade Hand the most intriguing." - Ikoma Hagio
designernotes: [Art Note: One Lion in the Pride has been experienced and should be featured front and center.]

text: Recon Reaction: After engaging at Jade's Roar's battlefield: You have Reconnaissance there. You have the first opportunity to take a Battle action in this battle, which must be a Terrain action.
title: Jade's Roar

flavor: "Do not mistake my demeanor for weakness. I embrace tradition and decorum, but Thunder speaks through me just as loudly as my sisters. Do not provoke its voice."

text: Limited: If you have attached a card from your hand this turn, bow Madoka: Draw a card.
title: Moshi Madoka

flavor: "An old friend who once aided our clan when we needed it most has returned. What terrible things must loom on the horizon for the Phoenix?" - Shiba Tsukimi

text: Open: If Kunji is honorably dead: Bring it into play, ignoring costs if you are a Phoenix Clan player.
title: Kunji

flavor: "I dispatched her to the Colonies to make use of her gifts. She remains there because I have begun to find her gifts… unsettling." - Shosuro Keirei

text: Limited: Target a card in a province: Discard it. Refill the province face-up.
title: Shosuro Hawado

flavor: "I am well pleased with your service, Negishi-san. I have a task that I need to entrust to a worthy vassal. Have you the courage for such a thing?" - Daigotsu Kanpeki

text:
After Negishi enters play: Lose 2 Honor.
Negate Negishi's destruction from effects of actions performed by any Personality whose unit's total Gold Cost was lower than Negishi's unit's (when they performed it).
title: Daigotsu Negishi

flavor: "Our Empire endured a war with a gaijin demon goddess. It cannot be torn apart by mere human frailty. It would be an insult to all who have bled and died to save it."

text: Reaction: After a Tactical Battle action resolves that Byung performed: Take an additional Battle action.
title: Shinjo Byung

flavor: "My mother once walked the path of the wave man. She came to serve the Dragon, and was a great hero. I shall walk her path again, and my greatness shall eclipse even hers."
designernotes: [Note: This is actually P'an Ku. I am just hiding the name from playtest.]

text: Iaijustu Limited: Target another player's Personality: Fusako challenges the target. His controller may bow him; if he is now bowed, he may refuse the duel. Destroy the duel's loser.
title: Fusako

flavor: "The commander has entrusted to me the safe-keeping of Journey's End City and the supply chain that ensures the Imperial Legion is prepared for anything. I will do precisely that."
designernotes: [Note: This is one of the Imperials who is having to decide whether the Empire should continue fighting the Colonies or turn their efforts towards P'an Ku]

text: Battle: Give your Followers in Barru's army +1F.
title: Seppun Barru

flavor: "I crave war. If I must fight alongside the Scorpion to experience it, then so be it."
"This Haruto is a despicable, hideous man, but his skill at war cannot be denied."
"When you believe that there is no limit to what an opponent is capable of, then it becomes true. Neither underestimate nor fear him, for both give him advantage." - Daidoji Kenshi

text: Before (each time) another player's action resolves during a battle at Shihiro's battlefield: Give Shihiro +1F (until the turn ends).
title: Akodo Shihiro

flavor: "For an acolyte, she possesses unique insights and tremendous skill. I think she will have a bright future, if she can but overcome her more earthly tendencies. Ironic, I know." - Isawa Norimichi, Elemental Master of earth
"Young? Perhaps I am. Power knows no age, and I shall see the Scorpion broken before me, as they were my ancestors."

The Scorpion forces surged forward to eliminate the battered Phoenix line, but a wall of earth sprang up to block their path. "Turn back and live," a woman's voice boomed, "or your corpses shall rest with the stones forever deep inside the earth."

title: Isawa Nairuko
flavor: "The blessings of the kami are meant for joy, not harm. Even so, I will do what I must."
text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Nairuko has +2F while she has a Spell.

(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Nairuko has +2F while she has a Spell.
title: Isawa Nairuko

flavor: "Every Phoenix hopes for peace. I simply understand that the path to peace may unfortunately be one strewn with ashes."
"For his crimes against the Scorpion, let him forever be known as the Murderer of Shutai. The other clans enjoy casting out pretentious labels, so let us see how they like it." - Bayushi Nitoshi

"I fear sensei Ochiai-sama would not have approved of my methods. I hope that in her retirement she is never burdened with the tale of my victories in the Scorpion lands. I wish her only contentment."

text: Battle: Bow Taiken: Ranged 4 Attack.
title: Isawa Taiken

flavor: "For all that I now wish for peace, however, I am unable to silence the hope that the Scorpion will see justice for their crimes."
"I understand now, truly understand, the desire for peace that so many of my brothers exemplify. I was a fool to have ever doubted their wisdom."
"When I was a child, I dreamt of serving the Phoenix as a warrior on the field of battle. Never did I imagine what horrors war holds for those who wage it."

text: (Stalwart cards negate their first bowing each turn by other players' cards.)
title: Shiba Jikaro

flavor: "When my life is at an end, what shall be said of me? Let others say only that I honored my clan above all else."

text: Battle: Target your Personality: Move him to Mitsushen's battlefield. If he moved, straighten his unit.
title: Shiba Mitsushen

flavor: "This is a disgrace, and I will bear it no longer. I will see Nitoshi answer for his crimes, each and every one of them."

text: Battle: Twice per turn, target a card in a unit: Straighten it. It may use its abilities a second time this turn.
title: Shiba Tsukimi

flavor: "Her lust for the deaths of our enemies is cold and calculating, but she shows potential. If she survives this war, she may emerge with some use in the future. We shall see what fate has in store." - Yogo Haruto
"I love nothing more than the feel of a dead Phoenix at the end of my blade. It fills me with a sense of pride, and I know my ancestors are smiling upon me."
"She is a monster, the likes of which can only be eclipsed by her dark master, Yogo Haruto. I will see her answer for his crimes or die in the attempt." - Isawa Nairuko

text: (Elite cards contribute Force even if bowed.)
title: Bayushi Kasumi

flavor: "Duels, court, war… all merely distractions."

text: Battle/Limited: Look at the top card of your Fate deck. If it is an attachment, you may attach it to one of your Personalities at Nitoshi's location, paying all costs. If it is a Strategy, you may take an additional action to play it (if legal).
title: Bayushi Nitoshi

flavor: "My will and my loyalty were tested in blood and fire, and I was not found wanting. I will bring glory to my ancestors for many years to come."
"Often I have wondered at my place in this world. I know now that I am a warrior, a weapon of the Scorpion, and I take comfort in that fact."
"There are those who question the honor of my lord. Such as they should pray they never cross my path."

text: Battle: Even if Utoro is bowed, discard a card and target a Personality: Straighten him.
title: Bayushi Utoro

flavor: "I follow your lead, Konishi. Together we will bring ruin to the house of Agasha."

Haruto's agents slipped into the city like shadows, laying the seeds for the ruin of the Agasha for days. While the Phoenix watched the Scorpion armies, the Scorpion's shadow was strangling them from within.

Konishi gave the signal, and Chikata felt joy surge in his heart. He emerged from the shadows like a dream, and his steel found the throat of a Phoenix sentry. As the man dropped lifeless to the ground, Chikata sighed happily. This was his life.

text: Battle: Even if Chikata is bowed, target a Scorpion Clan or Dragon Clan Personality: Bow or straighten him.
title: Shosuro Chikata

flavor: "He is delightfully devoid of anything resembling scruples or a conscience. It is amazing what a man can accomplish for his lord when he is without the burden of a soul." - Bayushi Nitoshi

text: Battle: Target a Follower in your discard pile: Attach it to Haruto, paying 2 less Gold.
title: Yogo Haruto

flavor: "The Phoenix saved me when I was lost, and they brought me back from the brink of the abyss. I will never crawl into a sake bottle again, and I will never forget the debt I owe to the Phoenix."

text: Battle: Even if Tsubo is bowed, target a Personality: Straighten him.
title: Tsubo

flavor: "There's a time for attack and a time for planning. Lucky for me, most of my plans tend to involve attacking."
designernotes: A Crab Berserker with a better grasp of tactics than your average Hida.

flavor: He throws himself into combat with reckless abandon, yet his troops follow him with unshakable trust.
designernotes: A Hiruma Scout/Yojimbo.

text: Before the first time each battle any of Ikeuchi's Followers are destroyed by another player's card's effect: If you have Reconnaissance, negate the destruction of one such Follower.
title: Hiruma Ikeuchi

flavor: "The Shadowlands might have fallen quiet in recent years, but we cannot afford to grow lax."
designernotes: An extremely honorable Kaiu Engineer tasked with defending the Crab holdings.

text: While Nagai is defending, he has Elite (Elite cards contribute Force even if bowed).
title: Kaiu Nagai

flavor: "My loyalty lies with my clan and the Empress, none other."
use: Experienced per involvement in the story, should be anti-Spider/Shadowlands.
designernotes: Experienced version of Kuni Renyu (TSE).

text:
Your provinces have +2 strength.
Your other Personalities with a base Gold Cost of 5 or higher enter play paying 2 less Gold.
title: Kuni Renyu

flavor: His victory over the Onyx Champion has only strengthened his resolve to destroy the Shadowlands.
use: Unique Crab (Slayed the Onyx Champion and became a Hero)
designernotes: Experienced version of Kuni Shinoda (EE). Killed the Onyx Champion.

text: Battle: Target an enemy card: Bow it. Destroy it if it is Shadowlands.
title: Kuni Shinoda

flavor: "Perhaps you can overlook this error once?"
designernotes: A Yasuki merchant bribing an official.

text: Limited: Bow Daito or pay 4 Gold, and target a Personality: Daito bribes him. Negate the target's straightening until after the next Straighten Phase ends.
title: Yasuki Daito

flavor: "Many times you have served the clan by protecting me, kinsman. Now it is time for me to serve the clan."

text:
Melee and Ranged Attacks targeting Akahiko have -4 strength.
Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Move him and Akahiko home. Gain 1 Honor.
title: Asahina Akahiko

flavor: "Indeed, I am aware of the many conflicts in the Empire, but I am the Jade Champion. I will never forget what my first duty to the Empire is."
use: Crane Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Experienced Asahina Nanae (originally from BtD) as the Jade Champion. Should be middle aged.

text: Battle/Open: Even if Nanae is bowed, target a Personality: You may straighten him. You may give him -4F. Bow him if he is Shadowlands.
title: Asahina Nanae

flavor: "There are so few of us here, so few. But if I must do the work of two in order to defend the Crane, then that is what I will do."
designernotes: A Daidoji Scout harassing a Mantis encampment in the Ivory Kingdoms.

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality or Follower: Move Ibara to oppose it. If she now opposes it, give it -3F and, if it is Mantis Clan, bow it.
title: Daidoji Ibara

flavor: "Kyoshiro, I've tried overlooking your insolence for the good of both our clans. But if you are so determined to die, well then I will be happy to oblige you."
designernotes: A Crane duelist facing off with Mirumoto Kyoshiro.

text: Open: Target another player's Mirumoto Kyoshiro: Iza duels him. Destroy the duel's loser.
title: Doji Iza

flavor: "I am an Explorer, not a common thief."
designernotes: Experienced Doji Kazuo (originally from TH) in the Second City. Should be middle aged.

text:
During a duel involving Kazuo, the other player must focus from his hand at his first opportunity(if able).
After your End Phase begins, if Kazuo won a duel, or you have gained 4 or more Honor, this turn: Look at the top 3 cards of a Fate deck. Put them back in any order.
title: Doji Kazuo

flavor: "Can you deny the testimony of your own eyes? Not even monasteries are safe from the greed of the Mantis! Shall the Empire tolerate this brutish violence any longer?"
use: Non-unique Crane Courtier, one of the Cranes, does not need to be this one, should be anti-Mantis
designernotes: A Crane Courtier doing courtier things in the Second City.

text: Political Open: Target a Personality: While he is at the current battlefield (later this turn), you may take a Battle action even if you control no units there. After that action ends, end this action's effects on him.
title: Doji Tatsuzo

flavor: "I wonder if these ruins could be of use to us…"
designernotes: Imperial Explorer

text:
Kojinrue may be assigned even if bowed.
You may choose Kojinrue to perform actions requiring an unbowed performer even if he is bowed.
title: Mirumoto Kojinrue

flavor: "I will not rest until I see you breathe your last, felled by my blade."
use: Non-unique Dragon Duelist Magistrate, In a Blood Feud with [Crane Blood Feud]
designernotes: Non-unique Dragon Duelist Magistrate, In a Blood Feud with [Crane Blood Feud]

text: Open: Target another player's Doji Iza: Kyoshiro duels her. Destroy the duel's loser.
title: Mirumoto Kyoshiro

flavor: "Consider this a lesson in humility."
designernotes: Non-unique Dragon Kensai, anti-Lion

text: (Elite cards contribute Force even if bowed.)
title: Mirumoto Yonekura

flavor: He has set aside his hatred and preaches serenity to his students.

text:
After Yozo enters play or overlays: Discard all your other Sensei Personalities.
After your Iaijutsu action resolves: Give any Personality who performed it +2F.
story: 2011 Favored of the Fire Dragon - Marcos Mendiara
title: Mirumoto Yozo

flavor: He is slow to anger, yet strikes with terrible precision when roused.
designernotes: Non-unique Dragon Earth Shugenja

text: Battle: If Tsuchiya is defending, destroy one of his Spells: Give him Stalwart and a Force bonus equal to his current Force. (Stalwart cards negate their first bowing each turn by other players' cards).
title: Tamori Tsuchiya

flavor: "The Imperial Legions are marching against the Second City? What are they prepared to do when they arrive?"
use: Non-unique Dragon Tattooed Monk, not a follwoer of Fudo, but cool with people finding their own path
designernotes: Non-unique Dragon Tattooed Monk, not a follwoer of Fudo, but cool with people finding their own path

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Move him home.
title: Togashi Mihato

flavor: "If it is the Spider who have attacked us, perhaps we should turn to those versed in fighting such abominations."
designernotes: A Lion Tactician peering over maps and battle reports. He is pro-Crab

text:
Crab Clan players may ignore Chiyo's Honor Requirement.
Battle: Melee 4 Attack.
title: Akodo Chiyo

flavor: "They should have remained uninvolved. A pity."
use: Lion Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Experienced version of Ikoma Satoru (TPW).

text: Limited: Show a card in your hand and choose another player: You offer him a gift. He may put the card in his hand; if he does, draw two cards. Otherwise, discard it, and Melee Attack with strength equal to its Focus Value targeting a Follower or Personality without Followers in his home.
title: Ikoma Satoru

flavor: "He is silent, observant, and possessed of a perfect memory. He has made our search for the Yodotai a great deal easier." - Ikoma Shika
designernotes: A young Ikoma Scout hunting for Yodatai.

text: Limited: Bow Shizuka: Search you Dynasty or Fate deck. If you find a Region, attach it to one of your provinces, paying all costs. If you find a Terrain, put it in your hand and discard a card.
title: Ikoma Shizuka

flavor: "A report from the Second City, my lady. The Akodo are not certain what the Spider have used against us, and hope you can unravel this mystery."
designernotes: A shugenja who is sent on errands to get get the more important Shugenja.

text: Limited: If Miwa is face-up in your province, discard her and pay 2 Gold: Search your Dynasty deck for a non-Unique Lion Clan Shugenja. Refill this province with him, face-up.
title: Kitsu Miwa

flavor: "Peace is a blessing to the Empire, perhaps, but a curse upon a warrior."
designernotes: Experienced 2 version of Akodo Tsudoken (previous version is from FL).

text:
Will not attach Items.
During battle resolution, if Sango is attacking, he contributes his Force twice.
title: Matsu Sango

flavor: "It is clear that the Spider are at fault. If the Dragon wish to defend that despicable clan, then the stories of their wisdom and honor are lies."
designernotes: An aggressive Lion Paragon who hates the Dragon.

text: Yoshito has +1F while attacking, or +2F if the Defender is Dragon Clan.
title: Matsu Yoshito

flavor: "Distract him, my little ones."
designernotes: A Kitsune with Butterflies distracting a Crane samurai.

text: Reaction: After Yuribara enters play: Create a 0F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Nonhuman • Butterfly • Cavalry • Spirit Personality with the traits, "Other player's Battle actions must target a Butterfly Personality at this battlefield, if legal," and "After another player's Battle action targets this card: Destroy this card."
title: Kitsune Yuribara

flavor: "I understand she guided her ship through the heart of a typhoon with hardly a scratch. What a pity I cannot have her on my own vessel." - Yoritomo Kaishou
designernotes: Mantis Thunder Shugenja in the Ivory Kingdoms.

text: Reaction: After an action targets a card in this unit: Give the action's performer (if any) -3F after the action resolves.
title: Moshi Ira

use: Unique Mantis, this is Hiromi's twin sister
designernotes: This is Hiromi's twin sister.

text:
Once per battle, Harumi may perform the Equip Battle action even if bowed and even if unopposed.
Battle: Target an enemy Follower or Personality without Followers: Give it -5F. Gain 2 Honor. If its Force is now 0 or you control Yoritomo Hiromi, destroy it. If it is still in play, you may take an additional Battle action.
title: Yoritomo Harumi

flavor: "We have faced the unnatural terrors of these waters for twenty years and survived. Do the Crane really think they can trouble us where the Great Death has failed?"
use: Non-unique Mantis Magistrate, anti-Crane, captain or crew member of the Fourth Storm
designernotes: A Mantis Magistrate on one of the giant Fourth Storm boats. At war with the Crane

flavor: "The Crane think to confront us? They will find only a watery grave."
use: Mantis Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Experienced Yoritomo Naoto (originally from EE) in the Ivory Kingdoms fighting with wild beasts.

text: Battle: Target an enemy Personality: Actions he or his Followers perform must target Naoto, if legal. You may take an additional Battle action.
title: Yoritomo Naoto

flavor: "My lord, this chui Daidoji Senshi seems unsettlingly well prepared for conflict with our clan, as though he has been expecting it… or planning to start it."

I'm seeing a proxy war between Dainagon and Makiko over the Second City Court being moved to TFC (being their clans' respective favor monkeys), through their protégés. Part test, part lesson, part playing the game. This one would be Dainagon's, and already has been shown involved in antics with Makiko herself. In her art, she should be shown besting [Bayushi Anti-Crane] in court somehow.

designernotes: Notes: A Kensei wielding a blade while arrogantly waving goodbye to an enemy.

text:
Takanori has +1C while he has a Weapon.
Battle: Fear equal to Takanori's Chi.
title: Mirumoto Takanori

flavor: "So the Crab believe only they comprehend the way of earth." The Tamori frowned. "What folly."
designernotes: Notes - A beefy and muscular Tamori Shugenja forming a large Dai-Tsuchi out of the solid rock, grasping it with one hand, and ominously approaching a Crab Clan Berserker with a grim look of determination.

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Your Provinces with one or more Fortifications attached have +1 strength.
title: Tamori Junya

flavor: "Emina's granddaughter received three marriage proposals. But she is too useful to give away just yet."
designernotes: Notes: Granddaughter of Tamori Emina. Dresses like Shaitung. She is beautiful like her grandmother, but with fierceness at the same time.

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Battle: Bow or destroy Touya's target Spell to reduce a target enemy Follower or Personality's Force by the Spell's Focus Value. If the Spell was Earth, gain 1 Honor.
title: Tamori Touya

flavor: "Do not attribute to mystical arts what could instead be attributed to discipline and indomitable will." -Shosuro Tosaku
use: Dragon Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Notes: A Monk in deep concentration.

text: Battle, :bow:: Destroy a target enemy attachment with Force less than or equal to Yayoi's Chi.
title: Togashi Yayoi

flavor: "To think I once worried that an Empire at peace meant there would be no chance for war."
use: Lion Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful), anti-Spider

text: Battle: Target one or two of your unbowed Personalities at another battlefield. If they would be opposed, move them to this battlefield.
title: Akodo Iketsu

flavor: Not all were pleased to see the two mightiest armies in the Empire set aside their differences for common goals.
designernotes: Notes: Training with a lion banner and a crab banner. Needed more Vanilla's.

text:
Keisuke's printed ability has Tireless while you control a Terrain or Crab Clan Personality at his battlefield.
Battle: Straighten a target attachment.
title: Ikoma Keisuke

flavor: "They are up to something," the Ikoma swore. "They are biding their time. I care not what others say, I will uncover the truth."
designernotes: Notes: A Scout on a Horse.

text:
(Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to the battle. You may Recruit a Reserve Personality, if they would be opposed, as an Absent Battle action.)
Shungo has +1F, or +2F if the Defender is Spider Clan, while attacking.
title: Ikoma Shungo

flavor: "Sometimes one's honor must be set aside..."
designernotes: Notes: A shugenja casting a spell, stopping something honorable from happening.

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Scorpion Clan players ignore Asato's Honor Requirement.
Home Water Battle, :bow:: Give a target enemy Follower or Personality -2F.
title: Kitsu Asato

flavor: "To use the Sodan-Senzo arts for war is distasteful." The Kitsu gestured to the spirit. "But our honored ancestor, Matsu Seijuro, convinced me to make an exception."
designernotes: Notes: Kitsu shugenja surrounded by spirit ancestors.

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Open, :bow:: Create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Ancestor • Samurai • Spirit Personality.
title: Kitsu Leiko

flavor: "These beasts respect cunning and power. They are not unlike humans."
use: Lion Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Notes: A wise man, with lots of experience leading an army of young soldiers to battle.

text: Battle, :g3:: Create a 1F Cat • Nonhuman Follower and attach it to your target Personality.
title: Matsu Marii

flavor: "I find your response disappointing. My friend, even more so!"
designernotes: A Kitsune (person) and her Kitsune spirit both with a look that they know more than you do

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Interrupt: After you Recruit Beiko, create a 5F/2C/3PH Mantis Clan • Bear • Nonhuman • Spirit Personality with the trait, "Has -2F while attacking" and the ability, "Battle: Fear 4."
title: Kitsune Beiko

flavor: "She is a formidable force in the Second City. Were she not so accursedly inflexible, I might actually like her." - Bayushi Shibata
designernotes: Notes - A Moshi shugenja in light flowing robes, dancing on the wind, with the rising sun behind her, illuminating her. There should be rumors that she, like Toturi Tsudao before her, is perhaps the long-awaited mortal reincarnation of Amaterasu.

text:
(Once a turn, the attacker gets the first Battle action, if it's from a Naval Personality's unit.)
Raiko has +1F/+1C while she has an Air, Fire, or Thunder Spell.
title: Moshi Raiko

flavor: "My family worked very hard to find a safe route to the north, Phoenix. Why should I allow you to benefit in our stead?"
designernotes: [A smug looking Tsuruchi Bounty Huntress]

text:
(You may Recruit a Reserve Personality, if they would be opposed, as an Absent Battle action.)
Battle, :bow:: Ranged 2 Attack.
title: Tsuruchi Hikari

flavor: "Let them come as often as they like, Ayumu-sensei. Each one that tries to take the blades is one that will never threaten the Empire again."
use: Mantis Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Yashiro doing something anti-shadolandsy

text: Jade Battle, :bow:: Ranged 4 Attack. Straighten Yashiro if the target was Shadowlands.
formattedtitle: Tsuruchi Yashiro, Defender of the Obsidian Blades • Experienced
puretexttitle: Tsuruchi Yashiro, Defender of the Obsidian Blades - exp
title: Tsuruchi Yashiro, Defender of the Obsidian Blades

flavor: "A good kill, eh? Too bad this is one of the smallest ones…"
designernotes: A Yoritomo in the Captain Morgan pose

text: Invest :g2:, or [0] if another player is Phoenix Clan: Permanently give Shotsuo Conqueror. (After this card enters play, you may also pay the Invest cost to get the effect, once. A Conqueror's unit doesn't bow after battle.)
title: Yoritomo Shotsuo

flavor: "My duty is to enforce the law. However, there are so many laws that quite a few contradict one another, leaving me with… leeway."
use: Mantis Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: A mantis firing from the ranks

text:
Tireless Open: Dishonor Yusuke to straighten him.
:bow:: Produce 2 Gold.
title: Yoritomo Yusuke

flavor: She does her best to pay her respects to the elements. She does not know if the voices in her mind are signs of insanity, or the messages of the kami.
use: Phoenix Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful), anti-Mantis Inquisitor
designernotes: An Isawa Shugenja who can barely function as a human being, but is a genius when it comes to the kami.

text:
(Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to this battle.)
Air Tireless Open: Straighten Genma.
title: Isawa Genma

flavor: "I have proven worthy of this position a hundred times over. I can show you again, if you prefer."
use: Phoenix Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Experienced version of Isawa Kaname.

text:
Fire Battle: Melee 2 Attack or Ranged 2 Attack.
Fire Engage: Give your target Shugenja +1F.
formattedtitle: Isawa Kaname, Advisor to the Ruby Champion • Experienced
puretexttitle: Isawa Kaname, Advisor to the Ruby Champion - exp
title: Isawa Kaname, Advisor to the Ruby Champion

flavor: "There are ways to avoid conflict. Display an unreasonable amount of force, and any bandit will lose his nerve."
designernotes: An Air Shugenja who uses illusions to frighten the enemies.

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Air Battle: Fear equal to Kido's Chi (Bow a target enemy Follower, or Personality without Followers, with Force equal to or lower than the Fear's strength).
title: Isawa Kido

flavor: He has given himself to the burning excess of Fire.
designernotes: A Fire Shugenja defending his Clan's land.

text: (A Conqueror's unit doesn't bow after battle. Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
title: Isawa Muira

flavor: He has the unenviable task of keeping the Isawa disciples of Water alive. He must do his best to keep up.
designernotes: A Young Shiba Yojimbo on a horse.

text:
(Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to the battle.)
Battle: Fear equal to 1 plus the number of actions resolved from your Kiho and Spells this battle.
title: Shiba Kakei

flavor: "Shh! Do you hear that?"
designernotes: A big, burly Shiba Yojimbo.

text:
Battle: Target your Shugenja at any location. Give Yuuchi a Force bonus equal to the target's Chi.
Battle, :bow:: Melee 2 Attack (Destroy a target enemy Follower, or Personality without Followers, with 2 or lower Force).
title: Shiba Yuuchi

flavor: "Hello, my Mantis friends. Perhaps after I have killed ten or so of you, you can teach me some wonderful sea songs to sing over your graves!"
use: Scorpion Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: A subtly mad samurai surrounded by enemies who seem slightly uncertain about fighting him. Would like to see him with some sort of demonic full mask, and one sashimono banner behind each shoulder, with the Scorpion Clan mon on one, and the Bayushi Family Mon on the other, both slightly tattered.

text:
(Kensai may attach two Weapons, as long as neither is Two-Handed.)
Battle: Give a target enemy Personality a Force penalty equal to Akagi's Force.
title: Bayushi Akagi

flavor: "Makiko's apprentice is a master rhetorician. She can make her opponents question their own purpose. Be wary of her." - Doji Dainagon
designernotes: Political nemesis of [Doji Anti-Scorpion]. Her art should be a foil to that card, showing her besting Anti-Scorpion in court somehow. Should probably send to Wibi too for art consistency. Art should evoke a comparison to her mentor, Makiko.

text:
After another player's Personality Lobbies, give him -1PH, or -2PH if he is Crane Clan.
Political Open, :bow:: Target a Personality whose current Personal Honor is lower than printed. His controller loses 1 Honor.
title: Bayushi Fuyuko

flavor: "Haha! The Crane never anticipated it, and the Imperials are too busy to care. I tell you, Kotomuri-san, I don't know which part of that makes me happier."
designernotes: 2012 Name a Personality - David Lapp. Want to play off this line from Lapp's Tourney report with regards to the art, "I don't have much of a report, main thing is that I won after finally playing sober after the cut, so that maybe says something." Lapp is a redhead (see the name), so perhaps some kind of red hair motif could be worked into the mask. I envisioned the amused, burned-out prodigy, fallen into vice and addiction, banished to the colonies. He still shows the occasional glimpses of genius when he can be roused.

text: Interrupt: After you Recruit Jinn-Ja, put a target non-Unique Political Strategy in your discard pile into your hand.
title: Bayushi Jinn-Ja

flavor: "He is brilliant, if troubled. It is my place to keep him alive, not ask questions."
designernotes: An intimidating samurai. Should incorporate an 'oriental dragon' style tattoo in some way. One of the rare 'honorable Scorpions'. Jinn-ja's yojimbo.

text:
(Draw a card after your Expendable card dies.)
Invest :g2:: Dishonor one or two target Personalities with lower Personal Honor. (After this card enters play, you may also pay the Invest cost to get the effect, once.)
title: Bayushi Kotomuri

flavor: "The Goju have come for you, mistress," she hissed. "Run, and I will give you the time you need to let the others know!"
designernotes: A Scorpion yojimbo leaping into impossible odds to save their charge.

text: Battle, :bow:: Melee 2 Attack, or Melee 3 Attack if the target is dishonorable (Destroy a target enemy Follower, or Personality without Followers, with Force equal to or lower than the Melee Attack's strength).
title: Shosuro Kayo

flavor: "The Lion, for all their skill, seemed to think the war began only when soldiers gathered on the field."
designernotes: This is a result of the South American Championship. It is a Scorpion who has infiltrated the Lion ranks.

text: Ninja Battle: Give a target enemy Personality a -1F/-1C Poison token. You may move Sadao home if the target was Lion Clan.
title: Shosuro Sadao

flavor: He looked at the corpse on the ground. "Talentless," he said with a sigh. When he turned his eyes to us, though, there was not disappointment - only death.
use: Spider Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)

text:
(Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists. Draw a card after your Expendable card dies.)
Battle: Fear 2.
title: Daigotsu Atsushi

flavor: "The visions drove him to our master, who has given him the strength to suffer through them. In turn, he shares his knowledge with the Spider." - Daigotsu Kanpeki
use: Spider Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful), this is the prophet who relays a message and then dies

text:
(Draw a card after your Expendable card dies.)
Open, :bow:: Look at the top five cards of your Fate deck. You may rearrange them. Draw a card. Destroy Teruo.
title: Daigotsu Teruo

flavor: "I sought perfection without the restraint of mercy. There was only one place for me to go."

text:
(Kensai may attach two Weapons, as long as neither is Two-Handed.)
After a Fear effect from a card in Nao's unit, or from your action that targeted Nao, bows a Follower, destroy it.
story: 2012 GenCon Costume Contest Winner - Matt Tyler
title: Nao

flavor: "The Togashi, pah! Too wrapped up in mysticism to know when to pick up something sharp instead of talk."

text:
Before one of Sora's Weapons is destroyed, draw a card.
Battle, :bow:: Melee 2 Attack. You may bow Sora's Weapon to straighten him.
title: Sora

flavor: "If you were not intrigued," she said with a smile, "you would have sent me away by now."
designernotes: Note - This character (http://imperialassembly.com/oracle/showimage?prefix=printing&cardid=10521&nestid=1&class=details&tagid=34&hash=3f/2d) from Blood of the Preserver Xp. Her Spider shoulder tattoo should be visible. She should appear supremely confident, as she has the backing of authority behind her.

text:
(You may Recruit a Reserve Personality, if they would be opposed, as an Absent Battle action.)
Mizuki's Reserve may be used as Absent Battle/Engage.
Invest :g1:: Take the Imperial Favor.
title: Susumu Mizuki

flavor: "Kuroko's husband is an odd one," Makoto mused. "That's the problem with that family. You know you should dislike them but they make it so difficult."
designernotes: Notes - The husband of Susumu Kuroko. She is at his side or nearby as he strolls confidently through the Colonial Court.

text:
After your Spider Clan Personality is destroyed, gain 1 Honor.
Home Political Battle, :bow:: Destroy your target Spider Clan Personality to destroy a target enemy card without attachments.
title: Susumu Takuan

flavor: "Such a fantastic shot deserves a little reward, don't you think? A snack fit for a master archer."

text: Battle, :bow:: Ranged 2 Attack. (Destroy a target enemy Follower, or Personality without Followers, with 2 or lower Force)
title: Aikiren

flavor: "I see with one eye what you cannot with two. I see victory."
designernotes: Art note: Badass one eyed kensai duellist, worn out Brown clothes, staring menacingly at his opponetnunder a heavy rain. CLICHE !!!

text:
(Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists. Kensai may attach two Weapons, as long as neither is Two-Handed.)
Iaijutsu Battle: Oneiyara challenges a target enemy Personality. After the duel, Fear equal to Oneiyara's Force that targets the loser.
title: Oneiyara

flavor: "Humans speak of honor, then crush those weaker than themselves. Little ones, you have nothing to fear so long as I am here."
designernotes: Card in memory of Shaun Patrick. his family asked for donations to animal shelter rescue projects in lieu of donations after he died, so I wanted to make a card that reflected this aspect of him. Perhaps art of a big, powerful Oni surrounded by appreciative goblins to which it has taken an affinity, an oddly cheerful scene, so that those that remember him can look at it and smile. Maybe a scene where the Oni has obviously just smashed a Crab samurai, and is happily looking on as the Goblins it protects enjoy the spoils of their victory.

text:
After Patairaku enters play, lose 3 Honor.
Battle, :g2:: Create a 1F Goblin • Nonhuman • Pet • Shadowlands Follower and attach it to Patairaku.
title: Patairaku no Oni

flavor: "This is the Blood that I have heard so much of, then? The very sight of it sickens me, yet I cannot deny that it radiates power such as I have never experienced."
designernotes: Notes - A dignitary from the Imperial Courts, trained in both politics and spellcraft, who is accepting the Blood of the Preserver on behalf of Iweko.

text:
(Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Teshan Lobbies without bowing.
title: Seppun Teshan

flavor: "The humans have fought for us long enough. All that remains of the Dark Naga must fall."
designernotes: Card in memory of Chris Justice's fiancÃ©e Jennifer. An honorable female naga, one of the naga leg shifters in the vein of Mara or Shabura. Probably need to get the artist some sort of image of Jennifer in order to help out with the details. The Savior trait was something he specifically asked for in his submission, and the "Warrior of the Bright Eye" is a very important thing to people familiar with the story and history of the Naga.

text:
Zenathaar will not join you if you control any Shadowlands Personalities. Your other Naga Personalities have +1PH.
Home Battle: Move your target Naga Personality home.
story: In Memory of Jennifer Flanagan Lavere
title: Zenathaar

flavor: "The Ide have a reputation for a reason, friends. I wish to increase our influence in this region. You wish to be able to fund your new venture. I think we can come to an understanding…"
designernotes: A Ide Courtier negotiating new tariffs.

text: :bow:: Produce Gold equal to Aragaki's Personal Honor, which may only pay for one Invest cost.
title: Ide Aragaki

flavor: She is always willing to help a friend, should they offer her a favor in return.
designernotes: A Ide Courtier talking with a Spider Courtier.

text:
Invest :g2:: Create a (bowed) Holding with the trait, ":bow:: Produce 1 Gold."
Economic Home Battle/Open, :g1:: Straighten your target Courtier, Unicorn Clan, or Spider Clan Personality.
title: Ide Kosaka

flavor: She followed in the footsteps of her parents. It is her greatest wish that duty one day return her to her family.
designernotes: A young Moto Death Priest.

text:
(Draw a card after your Expendable card dies.)
Tireless Battle: Erdene commits Seppuku. Bow a target enemy card. (Rehonor, then destroy, a Personality who commits Seppuku; these effects cannot be negated.)
title: Moto Erdene

flavor: "He has many who would fill the void in his heart. He needs only to turn to those by his side." - Moto Erdene
designernotes: Notes - A Unicorn Death Priest summoning the spirits of the dead using the medium of water in some fashion.

text:
(Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to this battle. Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Qorin has Naval while he has a Water Spell.
title: Moto Qorin

flavor: "My father took the Topaz Championship in his day. It is my honor to follow in his footsteps."
use: Unicorn Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: Notes - Shinjo Ajasu, the new Topaz Champion. He should be young and noble, wearing the Topaz Armor.

text:
(Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to the battle.)
Battle, :bow:: Ranged 2 Attack. If Ajasu has moved this battle, straighten him.
title: Shinjo Ajasu, Topaz Champion

flavor: "Some believe they are more important than Saiken-san because they march into combat, and he does not. They are fools." - Shinjo Ajasu
use: Unicorn Designer's Choice (should be generic and useful)
designernotes: The rare Utaku breeding male trying to prove he is useful for more than just studding.

text:
Saiken cannot gain Cavalry.
Home Engage, :bow:: Give Reserve to your target non-Unique Cavalry Personality in a Province.
title: Utaku Saiken

flavor: "The eye? No matter. I only need one to see my enemies."
designernotes: Requested to be missing left eye using a tsuba for the eye patch, and to be wielding a Dai Tsuchi

text:
(Battle: Discard a card to give this Tactician a Force bonus equal to the card's Focus Value.)
Courtesy: Ayameko has Resilient. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first. Once per game per card, a Resilient card does not die in battle resolution.)
title: Hida Ayameko

flavor: "The Spider think they are the only ones who use ruthless terror. He aims to show them their mistake." - Kuni Renyu
designernotes: A Hida samurai using the Spider's tactics against them. (Charles Urbach or Hector Herrera requested for the artist)

text:
While O-Win is opposing a Shadowlands or Spider Clan Personality, his printed ability is Unstoppable and its Fear has +1 strength.
Battle: Fear 3.
title: Hida O-Win

flavor: The Crab-Scorpion alliance against the Second Pit has even extended to tentative cooperation between Hiruma and Shosuro.
designernotes: A Crab Scout who trained with the Scorpion.

text: Toshi enters play for 1 less Gold if you are a Scorpion Clan player.
title: Hiruma Toshi

flavor: "She can be ill-mannered at times, but it is dangerous to understimate a sumai wrestler's influence." - Shosuro Yamazaki
designernotes: Love Letter Personality.

text: Battle: If Akemi is opposed, show a random card in the enemy leader's hand. You may discard a card with a higher Focus Value (from your hand) to discard the shown card.
title: Kaiu Akemi, the Diplomat

flavor: "I read Mirumoto's Niten in the dojo. It is not without merit."
designernotes: A young Crab Scout fighting with two swords.

text: Battle, :bow:: Melee 2 Attack. You may bow one of Kenjiro's Followers or Weapons to straighten him.
title: Hida Kenjiro

flavor: "We have labored long and hard to recover from the disasters of my predecessor's reign. Makoto's appointment is our greatest victory yet." - Master Tiger
designernotes: Experienced version of Yasuki Makoto, now the Imperial Advisor.

text: Economic Kolat Open, :bow:, :g5:: Draw a card.
title: Yasuki Makoto, Imperial Advisor

flavor: "Two factions, once in total conflict and clawing at each-other's throats... now allies, working towards the same goal. Can you still say this is not a valid strategy towards winning a war?" - Doji Makoto

text: Tomomi enters play for 1 less Gold if you are a Mantis Clan player.
title: Daidoji Tomomi

flavor: "I will make use of any weapon at my disposal. If fear is the better weapon, then so be it."

text:
Engage: If Nozomi moved this battle, give her Naval.
Battle: Fear equal to Nozomi's Force, or 2 if she is Naval.
title: Daidoji Nozomi

flavor: The Nakodo always knows best.

text:
Courtesy: After you Recruit Takato, gain 1 Honor. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first.)
Interrupt: After you Recruit Takato, discard a card to make a target player discard a random card. Each of you may put the other's card in your hand.
title: Doji Takato, the Manipulator

flavor: "I have been criticized for writing books and telling stories about my cases. They say that criminals will learn from them... learn how to avoid the magistrate. I dare them to try. Anyone who reads my work and believes a life of crime is best has missed the point. These stories are not mere entertainment. They are warnings."

title: Doji Shimada
flavor: "Go forth to war, my kinsmen. Know that you have my support and, through my art, you shall have the support of the other Great Clans as well. This I can gladly do for you."
"Still standing in my way! There is a man who wants to die!"
designernotes: Notes - Kakita Hank's brother from ALS with his beloved Katana at his side. Would be great to have the same artist who did Hank also do Dean, and have Hank in the art. Want to build these two up as brothers with a healthy rivalry.

text:
Daitsu has +1C while you control Kakita Shinichi. Daitsu will only attach one Weapon.
Unstoppable Battle, :bow:: Melee 2 Attack. (Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
title: Kakita Daitsu

flavor: "He took the name of his ancestor upon his gempukku, a man who was known as a living ghost of vengeance. From the anger in his eyes, I did not doubt they were of the same blood." - Daidoji Akeha

text:
Yurei will not enter play if you control a Fallen or Shadowlands Personality. Yurei has +1F for each Personality with 0 Personal Honor opposing him.
Battle: Fear equal to Yurei's Force.
title: Daidoji Yurei

flavor: "Two seasons of denouncements and conflicts, and now Noboru-sama stands on the same side as the Crab! For all the division that Seiken has caused, he has created interesting unities as well."
designernotes: A grey haired mirumoto duellist in a duelling pose, looking very tense, almost angry.

text: Iaijutsu Battle: Yoritama challenges a target enemy Personality. Give the loser -3F. You may take an additional action if Yoritama has two Weapons.
title: Mirumoto Yoritama

flavor: "I do not claim to know my lord's motivations. My understanding is not required. I have my orders, and faith in my lord. I know they may bring me before him in battle. So be it."

text: Iaijutsu Battle: Touya challenges a target enemy Personality. The winner creates Fear 4 targeting a (legal) card in the loser's unit (there is no effect in a tie).
title: Mirumoto Touya

flavor: "The Daughter of Heaven is of the same blood as my clan. Whatever occurs, I cannot allow shame to befall the Iweko name."
designernotes: He was stated as being someone who was journeying with Tamori Tamoko during her efforts in the Colonies.  Currently he holds a position as Scribe for the Dragon Embassy in Second City. Assisted with the investigation of a strange scream heard in the Artisan District. Chikyu has been mentioned in some of the canon fictions for the Sins of the Father storyline since then. Would like the taunt mechanics as well as setting up a "linebacker defense" via Tamori Yamabushi to kill enemy armies in Battle Resolution.   Just that Chikyu would be suited for an Honor deck that can also function well defensively.

text: Political Open: If it is another player's turn, target his unbowed Personality. Gain 1 Honor before the turn ends if the target did not attack you this turn.
title: Tamori Chikyu

flavor: "The Asahina would do well to remember their debts to us."
designernotes: A Shugenja in the field of battle, with a spirit (vaguely translucent), that looks like a soldier made of rocks, standing right behind him, looming over him.

text: Courtesy: After you Recruit Daiishu, gain 2 Honor and permanently give him Naval. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first. Once a turn, the Attacker gets the first Battle action, if it's from a Naval Personality's unit.)
title: Tamori Daiishu

flavor: "He is a prestigious man," Miaka said, "he would be a good husband." "And what does your heart say?" Gozato asked.

text:
After you Recruit Doji Takato or Matsu Misato, bow Gozato.
Void Tireless Battle: Bow your target unbowed Ring. Straighten Gozato or move him home.
title: Togashi Gozato, the Wise Monk

flavor: The Spider and Dragon now leaned on one another more and more. But neither side forgot the circumstance that had brought them together.
designernotes: Young Mirumoto Samurai-ko strolling around in the colonies with a Spider Samurai, discussing with him and smiling.

text:
(Draw a card after you Recruit a Destined card. Kensai may attach two Weapons, as long as neither is Two-Handed.)
Unless you are Spider Clan, discard a card after you Recruit Tsukino.
title: Mirumoto Tsukino

flavor: "Never doubt the Lion Clan. Even if the odds rush against us, victory is inevitable."
designernotes: A Samurai that looks like Akodo Kuon standing serenely on the battlefield of Lion samurai as a battle comes to a close with flavor text a long the lines of "For the Lion, victory is inevitable."

text:
(Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists.)
Battle: Straighten a target enemy unit in the Defender's home. Its controller may choose to move it to this battlefield. If he does not choose this, give this Province -2 strength.
title: Akodo Raikitsu

flavor: "The legacy of the Lion Clan is bigger than us all. We must be worthy of that title."
designernotes: Ayumi stands over a defeated bandit while appreciative peasants look on. She wields a polearm and wears her signature hood. Same artist as previous version if possible (Matthew Armstrong).

text:
(Once per turn, as an Absent Engage, move your unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit to the battle.)
Open: Give Ayumi's target Follower Cavalry.
story: 2013 A Hero for the Ages II - Darek Drzewososki
title: Ikoma Ayumi

flavor: "The kami do not obey the will of man, but they will give aid where there is need."
designernotes: A young priestess who abhors politics praying at a humble shrine to the memory of her fallen twin brother (ANO039) killed by the Scorpion betrayal of the Traditionalists.

text: Open, :g3:: If Suzaki is in your Province and you are Lion Clan, you may shuffle her into your deck to gain 1 Honor and create a 2F/2C/3PH Lion Clan • Ancestor • Samurai • Spirit Personality in your home.
title: Kitsu Suzaki

flavor: "I will watch over you, sister, until you have raised our family name to the greatness it deserves."
designernotes: The spirit of the dead twin brother of ANO040, watching over her. He was killed in the battle where the traditionalists were betrayed, fighting at the side of the Phoenix Clan.

text:
(Draw a card after you Recruit a Destined card.)
Yuyama has +1F if you are Phoenix Clan.
title: Akodo Yuyama

flavor: With the restraints unleashed, the Lion Clan raged across the Colonies. The name "Seiken" echoed from a thousand throats.
designernotes: Hachiro astride a horse, surrounded by his few soldiers, in the mountains. His art should be consistent with his art in TCS (Mark Poole again if possible). Of particular note he carries his signature trident-like Polearm (card ANO094). He also wears the Daisho of Water, but feels unworthy to draw it.

text:
Hachiro has +2F while attacking.
Unstoppable Battle: Melee 2 Attack, or Melee 3 Attack if the target is Scorpion Clan. (Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
title: Matsu Hachiro

flavor: While she is grateful for her current honor, she wishes to be on the battlefield alongside her sisters. The shameful thought presses her to perfection.

text: Battle: If Misato is opposed, target a player. He discards a card at random to draw a card. Give Misato +1F.
notes: This is a distinct card from Matsu Misato from Glory of the Empire & Ivory Edition.
title: Matsu Misato, the Hatamoto

flavor: "Where are you going? Do you not want to meet my new friend? You're being rude!"
designernotes: A Small woman Shugenja mounting a HUGE Elephant spirit riding toward us and a few frightened soldiers.

text: Interrupt: After you Recruit Yoshioka, create a 4F/2C/3PH Elephant • Nonhuman • Spirit • Cavalry Personality with the ability, "Battle: Fear 3, or Fear 4 if the target is Cavalry."
title: Kitsune Yoshioka

flavor: The Kitsune and Moshi families are very different in most ways, but in certain ways they are strikingly similar. Reverence for the natural order of things is chief among them.
designernotes: A kitsune male shugenja in the forest, surrounded by a lot of animal spirits. We should recognize as many of the already printed legal spirits as possible: the elephant in the background, a monkey in the trees, a boar, a fox …

text: After you Recruit Gorikki, if you are Crane Clan, take the Imperial Favor.
title: Kitsune Gorikki

flavor: "Carry this message for me, captain. 'We have established a perimeter around the Sea of Shadows, but all remains quiet for now. Orders?'"
designernotes: A well dressed magistrate holding some kokus, with the usual hat, talking with a merchant in a market.

text:
Courtesy: Nishigori enters play for 1 less Gold.
Once per turn, if Nishigori is unbowed, produce 3 Gold which can only pay for a single Strategy's action.
title: Yoritomo Nishigori

flavor: "Two Lion, a Crab, and a Scorpion," he whispered under his breath. "Not a bad day."
designernotes: Archer firing his arrow while running and already searching a new arrow in his quiver. Have a Wasp armband.

title: Tsuruchi Satou
flavor: "I haven't killed a Crane before. What a delightful opportunity this will be."
text: Battle, [bow]: Ranged 4 Attack (Destroy a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 4 or lower Force).
designernotes: Archer firing his arrow while running and already searching a new arrow in his quiver. Have a Wasp armband.

text: Battle, :bow:: Ranged 4 Attack (Destroy a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 4 or lower Force).
title: Tsuruchi Satou

flavor: Etsui's student looked up at the swirling clouds, a gleam in his unusual left eye. "This is how you stop a Mantis? Using your shugenja to summon storms? Hahahaha!"
designernotes: Bare chested Mantis in a storm on board of his boat, hair attached with a headband, laughing defiantly, looking almost mad.

title: Yoritomo Raiden
flavor: "Sail up a river during monsoon season so that you can help in the fight against the Crane? Of course, my lord Champion. I thought you wanted something difficult."
text: Unstoppable Battle: Fear 3, or Fear 4 if the target is Phoenix Clan. (Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
designernotes: Bare chested Mantis in a storm on board of his boat, hair attached with a headband, laughing defiantly, looking almost mad.

text: Unstoppable Battle: Fear 3, or Fear 4 if the target is Phoenix Clan. (Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
title: Yoritomo Raiden

flavor: Throughout the Colonies, the Mantis took the forefront of the progressive forces. Determined to earn their rightful place as lords of the Colonies, Hiromi's men seemed to be everywhere.
designernotes: Scout hidden/camouflaged in the Colonies jungles. Should be almost invisible :some traits visibles, and the eyes, but not much else at a first glance.

title: Yoritomo Yakuwa
flavor: He watched the Crane scouts fade in and out of the wilderness like wraiths. "This may be more of a problem than we anticipated," he muttered.
text: (Once a turn, the Attacker gets the first Battle action, if it's from a Naval Personality's unit.)
designernotes: Scout hidden/camouflaged in the Colonies jungles. Should be almost invisible :some traits visibles, and the eyes, but not much else at a first glance.

text: (Once a turn, the Attacker gets the first Battle action, if it's from a Naval Personality's unit.)
title: Yoritomo Yakuwa

flavor: "I will not see the future marred by the dangerous philosophies of Iweko Shibatsu! Iweko Seiken will sit upon the throne, or I will die in the attempt!"
designernotes: A large Isawa Shugenja hurling fireballs at his enemies.

text: Fire Interrupt: After the action resolves, if it was Fire and bowed or destroyed any enemy cards, give your target Shugenja +2F.
title: Isawa Nomura

flavor: "You may no longer be an Imperial princess, Miaka-sama, but you are a daughter of Iweko and will always have my service if you wish it."

text: Air Open, :bow:: After the next time this phase another player's action targets one of your cards, negate its (remaining) effects.
title: Isawa Tenkawa, the Scholar

flavor: "I find the sea quite calming. Strange, I know."
designernotes: A Phoenix Shugenja battling the Mantis.

text:
Ranged Attacks targeting Fujigawa have -1 strength if another player is Mantis Clan.
Courtesy: Abilities on Fujigawa's Spells have Unstoppable. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first. Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
title: Isawa Fujigawa

flavor: "The Empire is concerned about monstrosities born of the Sea of Shadows. There are allies to be had in such a battle." - Asako Miyabi
designernotes: Some sort of honorable Sea creature aligned with the Phoenix.

text:
Kyuji may only move to a battlefield if any enemy units are there. (Assigning isn't moving.)
Water Battle: If Kyuji has not moved to a battlefield this turn, give it +2F/-2C.
title: Kyuji

flavor: "Keep your back to me, my lady," Koshiba cautioned. "These Unicorn are devious foes."
designernotes: A Shiba Yojimbo working with the Lion (see in particular #37).

text: Unstoppable Battle: Give a target enemy Follower or Personality -1F, or -3F if you control a Lion Clan Personality or your Stronghold's Gold Production is 3. (Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
title: Shiba Koshiba

flavor: "Regardless of what happens to me, I shall live forever through my actions."
designernotes: A young Shiba Yojimbo with a scarred face.

text: (Draw a card after you Recruit a Destined card. Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists.)
story: Ever optimistic, ever loved, never forgotten - Joshua Davis
title: Shiba Kintaro, the Remembered

flavor: Sometimes love and duty coincide.
designernotes: [Note: BF/GF Costume Contest winners from Poland.]

text:
This counts as two cards when destroyed during battle resolution.
Tireless Open: If you have targeted Aggushi & Janqu with a Political action this turn, straighten them.
Battle, :bow:: Melee 3 Attack.
story: 2013 Euros Costume Contest Winners - Agnieszka Stasiowska & Marcin Janoszek
title: Bayushi Aggushi & Bayushi Janqu

flavor: "If Sihung couldn't kill me, no Lion will!"
designernotes: [Note: Experienced Irezu leading the Scorpion to fight the Lion]

text:
Irezu has +1C if another player is Lion Clan.
Battle: Move home a target unit whose total Force is less than or equal to Irezu's Chi.
title: Bayushi Irezu

flavor: Despite her lord's reservations, Tenzan's wife was allowed to join him on his seemingly hopeless quest.

text:
Iyashi has Courtier while you control The Sorrow.
Battle, :bow:: Melee 2 Attack, or Melee 4 Attack if you control The Sorrow or the target is Shadowlands.
title: Bayushi Iyashi, Lady Sorrow

flavor: "His mask is imposing, but the man himself seems meek. It's all very confusing. What is he really?" - Kaiu Akemi
designernotes: [Note: Shosuro Yamazaki from LL]

text:
Interrupt: After you Recruit Yamazaki, show a random card in another player's hand.
Political Open, :bow:: Rehonor and bow a target dishonorable Personality.
title: Shosuro Yamazaki, the Master Courtier

flavor: "The Scorpion need power, regardless of the source. And we know how to handle such things."
designernotes: [Note: A Yogo Shugenja who dabbles in Blood Magic for the great good, because, y'know, he can control this.]

text:
After a dishonorable Personality is destroyed, his controller loses 1 Honor.
:bow:: Produce Gold equal to Chijin's Chi which can only pay for a single Air or Maho Spell.
title: Yogo Chijin

flavor: "The Hiruma have learned many things from us. I wonder what we will learn from the Hida?" - Bayushi Nitoshi
designernotes: [Note: A Scorpion Samurai working along side a Crab ally. Art should tie in with Hiruma Rugen from this set.]

text:
Courtesy: Gorobei has Conqueror. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first.)
Gorobei has +1F while in an army with a Crab Clan Personality.
title: Yogo Gorobei

flavor: "Oh, to the contrary, I am very interested in maintaining order, Hida-san. You might even say I am willing to go to great lengths for it."
designernotes: A steel-eyed Spider Clan Obsidian Magistrate. Winter Court 3 Character.

text:
(Duelists win tied duels versus non-Duelists.)
Unstoppable Battle: Fear 3, or Fear 4 if Takahide has won a duel this turn. (Other players cannot Interrupt Unstoppable actions.)
title: Daigotsu Takahide

flavor: "I have enjoyed far more freedom as a Gyushi than I ever did among the Chuda!"
designernotes: A simply-dressed shugenja crafting a sinister weapon using fire magic and smithing tools.

text: Fire Open, :g3:: Create a +2F/+1C One-Handed • Sword • Weapon Item and attach it to your target Personality.
title: Gyushi Kageto

flavor: "The Empire has forgotten us, master. They will be reminded soon enough."
designernotes: A muscled and sinister monk seen from behind, sitting in a lotus position in a dark cave on top of a pile of broken and mangled people, meditating. Various mad musings are scrawled onto the walls of the cavern with the blood of the dead. Blood can be seen on his hands and fingers.

text: (Draw a card after you Recruit a Destined card. Kensai may attach two Weapons, as long as neither is Two-Handed.)
formattedtitle: Kokujin Dairu, Student of the Dark Lotus
title: Kokujin Dairu, Student of the Dark Lotus

flavor: "It is done," whispered Dairu. Fire danced in his eyes.
designernotes: A Spider Monk receiving a tattoo of a setting sun on her back from a Togashi tattoo artist. Either secretly or otherwise, this Monk is a follower of Kokujin's teachings.

text: Tireless Battle: Bow your target unbowed Dragon Clan or Monk Personality to straighten Kuchika. You may destroy the target to give Kuchika +2F and permanently give her Tattooed.
formattedtitle: Kokujin Kuchika, Blood of the Dark Lotus
title: Kokujin Kuchika, Blood of the Dark Lotus

flavor: "Perhaps your school is older, my friend, but I've danced the courtly dance while you were still crawling."
designernotes: A charming and smiling Susumu courtier.

text:
Courtesy: You have a +5 Lobby Bonus. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first.)
Interrupt: After you Recruit Issei, put a Political Battle Strategy from your discard pile into your hand.
title: Susumu Issei

flavor: "It seems these coins are counterfeit. How unfortunate for the Crab." Kengo grinned.
designernotes: A Susumu politician messing with the Crab's money on orders from Kuroko.

text:
(Draw a card after your Expendable card dies.)
Kengo has +1PH (in and out of play) if another player is Crab Clan.
title: Susumu Kengo

flavor: "My name? It no longer matters. Only the Void matters. Only the secrets."
designernotes: A Void Shugenja who was kicked out of the Phoenix Clan for reasons we are unaware of.

text:
(Once per game per card, a Resilient card does not die in battle resolution. Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
Will not gain the "Phoenix Clan" Clan Alignment.
title: Banished

flavor: "Still run-running, manling, and young-young now, if Tomorrow try to catch again."
designernotes: Notes - Can become a 4F for 5 with some investment and 5 via miracle.  The Ashalan thing is mostly flavour as there is only one card in the arc that is Ashalan, that being Ashalan Ambush, a Strat from GoC. This one's for Braun.

text: Br'nn has +1F while he has an attachment. Br'nn has +1F while an attachment is in another player's discard pile. Br'nn has +1F while another player controls an Ashalan card.
title: Br'nn

flavor: Imperial heirs marry for duty, but she dares hope she might also marry for love.

text:
Will not gain a Clan Alignment. After your turn begins, if you control six other Love Letter cards with different titles and six Affection tokens, you win the game.
Favor Political Open, :bow:: Discard the Imperial Favor to draw a card.
title: Iweko Miaka, the Princess

flavor: "Serve Spider? No. That father, not me."
designernotes: Notes - As Kayomasa grew old, he did not forget the oath he swore to Daigotsu.  Now, his sons have taken up the mantle and will protect Kanpeki or his progeny if they are called upon.

text:
After Masajiro enters play, lose 2 Honor.
Home Battle: If he would be opposed, move Masajiro to the current battlefield. After he moves, straighten his attachments if there is another Nonhuman or Unique Personality in his army.
title: Masajiro

designernotes: Notes - He likes to steal things. A Goblin in a cave hording items.

text:
After Keppo enters play, lose 3 Honor.
Interrupt, [*]: If the action Recruits Keppo or is his printed Battle action, after it resolves, Equip a target attachment from another player's discard pile to him.
Battle: Destroy a target enemy attachment with 4 Gold Cost or less.
story: 2013 A Hero for the Ages - Anthony Lawrence
title: Keppo

flavor: "Retired? Hardly. Just a new market to work for recruits."
designernotes: Notes - A way for the Kobi Sensei to actually have a bit more teeth. Try to stay true to what Jinn-Kuen has always been.

text:
Other players' actions targeting The Abbot cost 2 more Gold (even actions without Gold costs).
Invest :g1:: Gain a Conspiracy Token. You may give a target card you do not control a Clout Token.
Kolat Political Open: Straighten a target Holding.
title: The Abbot

flavor: "Some consider my victory unusual, but then these are unusual times."
designernotes: A weathered, well-traveled Unicorn trader leading a large and prosperous trading caravan.

text:
Hideshi's Invest is :g0: if another player is Phoenix Clan.
Invest :g2:: Permanently give another player's target Holding the trait, "After this Holding bows, each player gains 1 Honor."
title: Ide Hideshi, Topaz Champion

flavor: "If only you could hear my words from the lips of Lady Naleesh. She believes strongly in the cause, as I do."
designernotes: A sly Unicorn politician gladhanding through courts.

text: Courtesy: Igo has Destined. (Courtesy traits do not take effect if you went first. Draw a card after you Recruit a Destined card.)
title: Ide Igo

flavor: She walked through the battlefield, her footsteps falling just shy of the ground. She whispered the names of the fallen and felt the echoes in her soul.
designernotes: A Death Priest spinning on a battlefield, at the center of a field of fallen Phoenix and Unicorn Samurai, drawing power from their deaths.

text: Interrupt, :bow:: After the action resolves, if its Fear effects bowed any cards without attachments, destroy them.
title: Moto Nergui

flavor: "Death holds no power when you give it no hold within your soul."
designernotes: A large, imposing, thick bearded Moto commander leading armies to battle against the Phoenix Clan. He is a zealot to the Lords of Death.

text:
Tadasu has +1F while you control a Death Priest.
Unstoppable Battle: Fear 3 that may target Spells. Destroy any Spells this bowed. (Spells have 0 Force.)
title: Moto Tadasu

flavor: "You may not want to hear my words, Tadasu-san, but you must heed them if you wish to bring victory to our clan."
designernotes: A grim, powerfully built Moto Death priest with an intimidating glare. He is the Hatamoto and personal advisor to [Moto Magic Masher] (ANO074).

text: (A Conqueror's unit doesn't bow after battle. Shugenja may attach and cast Spells.)
title: Moto Chizura

flavor: "Haha!" she shouted in pure glee. She knew death lurked inches from her in every direction, but in her heart of hearts she knew she would not die this day.
designernotes: A brave and headstrong young female Shinjo magistrate breaking through a group of bandits, riding one down, accompanied by a ronin partner (ANO079).

text:
Saeki has +1F while in an army with any Ronin.
Battle: Give a target enemy Personality -2F. If he has lower Personal Honor, give Saeki +1F.
title: Shinjo Saeki

flavor: "As for myself, I care little who sits on the throne. I am but a soldier, and I will never be in his presence. I wage war on the Shadowlands, and that is all."

text: Battle, :bow:: Reduce a target enemy Follower or Personality's Force by Taisho's Force.
title: Hida Taisho

flavor: "You have served well despite your curse, brother. I swear to you, and to our parents in the next world, I will find a way to end your life. Trust me, Kaiji."
designernotes: Art: A wounded, blood covered Berserker posing in the remains of a battlefield. Despite his injuries he still looks ready to fight again.

text:
(A Conqueror's unit doesn't bow after battle.)
Battle: Fear equal to Zaiburo's Force minus 1.
title: Hida Zaiburo

flavor: "The Kokujin monks have returned, Shara-sensei. I swear to you, I will end them."
designernotes: Art: A female Crab samurai with blue facepaint readying herself for battle. The strange claw/axe weapon from Hida Shara's art is hanging on the wall of the room in a place of honor.

text:
(Once per game per card, a Resilient card does not die in battle resolution.)
Engage: If Raikohime is opposed, discard a card to make the enemy leader either discard a Battle Strategy, or show you his hand if it does not have one.
title: Hiruma Raikohime

flavor: He inspected every single seam, spending hours upon hours supervising the work. The Kaiu were not known for their expertise without just cause.
designernotes: Art: A buff Samurai examining the craftsmanship of a stone wall as some younger looking Kaiu look on, waiting for his verdict.

text: Before you Proclaim Burei, increase the Honor gain to equal the number of your Fortifications in play, up to 5.
title: Kaiu Burei

flavor: "What simpleton drew up these plans? Look at these oversights. I could capture this fortification with a dozen men. No, this will not do at all."
designernotes: Art: A female Kaiu general with a ton of architectural plans and maps spread across her room and desk. She seems to be analyzing them, trying to determine a plan of attack.

text: Battle, :bow:: If Daikohime is defending, Ranged 3 Attack. After this destroys a card, gain 1 Honor.
title: Kaiu Daikohime

flavor: "The construction seems to be ahead of schedule. I think the new Emperor will be very pleased."
designernotes: Art: An older Watsuki looking to a large castle structure in the distance, a smug look of satisfaction on his face.
